Putin admits Russia is ‘going through a difficult period’ as relentless Ukrainian drone attacks cut off fuel supplies
description: Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that Moscow was actively reviewing fuel export agreements to avoid compromising domestic needs.
content:
Ukraine kept up its heavy drone assault on Russia, setting fire to a major oil refinery in the south and killing at least two people, Russian authorities said Sunday, as President Vladimir Putin acknowledged his country is going through a “difficult period.”



Ukraine has markedly stepped up its long-range attacks on Russian military industries and energy facilities in recent months, aiming to cut Moscow’s revenue for its invasion — now in its fifth year — and make Russians feel the consequences.



The campaign has choked Russian fuel supplies and military deliveries. According to Western analysts, it has also slowed Moscow’s efforts on the battlefield, heaping pressure on the Kremlin to come to the negotiating table.



“Our ‘long-range sanctions’ reached two oil refineries in Russia,” Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy wrote on the Telegram messaging app on Sunday. “Each (strike) means a reduction in the resources that fuel the Russian war machine, and another step toward peace.”



Debris from downed Ukrainian drones sparked a blaze at the refinery in Slavyansk-na-Kubani, a town in Russia’s Krasnodar region, east of occupied Crimea, according to Gov. Veniamin Kondratyev. The falling debris killed one person in Slavyansk and wounded another in a nearby village, local authorities said.



The Slavyansk site is one of southern Russia’s major refineries, processing close to 4 million tons of crude per year, according to its operator’s website. It is also a key source of petroleum products intended for export through Russia’s Black Sea ports, including fuel oil, naphtha and marine fuel.



Zelenskyy also claimed that a second Russian refinery, in the Yaroslavl region around 700 kilometers (435 miles) from the Ukrainian border, was hit during the nighttime strikes.



There were no immediate reports from Russian authorities about the strike on the Yaroslavl refinery. Local Gov. Mikhail Evraev reported on Sunday morning that some roads between Moscow and the region’s capital, Yaroslavl, were temporarily closed due to “an enemy attack by Ukrainian drones.”



Yaroslavl’s airport also briefly closed overnight, along with others in southern and western Russia, according to the country’s civil aviation agency.



Fuel shortages in Russia as Putin says plans will be ‘adjusted’



For months, Ukraine has been stepping up attacks on energy facilities deep inside Russia. Despite a raft of Western sanctions, Moscow remains among the world’s top exporters of oil and natural gas.



More recently, Ukraine has attempted to choke off fuel deliveries to Crimea, the Black Sea peninsula illegally annexed by Moscow in early 2014. Last weekend, Kremlin-installed officials in Crimea suspended gasoline sales to civilians, after Kyiv’s targeting of supply routes triggered the worst energy crisis there since the annexation.



Russian President Vladimir Putin commented on Sunday that the country was “going through a difficult period,” but insisted that Moscow would “honor all its social obligations” to citizens. He did not directly reference the Ukrainian strikes or fuel shortages.



“Naturally, we are adjusting certain plans in light of the current situation, but all strategically important (domestic) development programs will undoubtedly be implemented in full,” Putin said at a conference of his ruling United Russia party.



“We will continue to build housing and roads, create new, modern, high-paying jobs, and support domestic businesses,” he said. “We are going through a difficult period, but this has taught us a great deal, and allowed us to grasp the very essence of what it means to be a Russian citizen.”



Russian Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that Moscow was actively reviewing fuel export agreements to avoid compromising domestic needs.



Fuel sales to civilians were also being restricted in Russia’s Irkutsk region in Siberia, thousands of kilometers (miles) from the Ukrainian border, local Gov. Igor Kobzev announced on Sunday.



Drivers will be barred from buying more than 50 liters (13 gallons) of fuel per vehicle per day at state-run Rosneft gas stations in the province, Kobzev said, adding that other gas stations may set lower limits.



At least two private gas station networks in Siberia — KreisNeft in the Irkutsk region and Elke Auto in the Tomsk region farther west — said earlier this month that they were limiting sales due to supply disruptions.



Drones, bombs and missiles target more regions



Also on Sunday, a Russian aerial bomb killed two people in Zaporizhzhia — a city in southern Ukraine — and injured 16 others, including two children, said regional administration head Ivan Fedorov.



In Russia’s border region of Belgorod, Ukrainian drone strikes killed one person and injured another earlier on Sunday, according to acting local Gov. Alexander Shuvayev.



Russia’s Defense Ministry said its forces shot down 213 Ukrainian drones during the night, including over Russia, occupied Crimea and the Black and Azov seas.



Meanwhile, Russia attacked Ukraine with 142 long-range strike drones and eight missiles overnight, according to the Ukrainian air force. Of those, 125 drones and seven missiles were struck down, the air force said.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়, মহাবিদ্যালয়ে পুঁজিৰ জোৰা নিজেই মাৰিব লাগিব :  শিক্ষা মন্ত্ৰী ৰণোজ পেগু
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, শিৱসাগৰ : অসমৰ বিশ্ববিদ্যালয় আৰু মহাবিদ্যালয়সমূহে পুঁজিৰ জোৰা নিজেই মাৰিব লাগিব বুলি স্পষ্ট কৰি দিছে শিক্ষামন্ত্ৰী ডা০ ৰণোজ পেগুৱে ৷ শনিবাৰে শিৱসাগৰ বিশ্ববিদ্যালয় পৰিদৰ্শন কৰি শিক্ষা মন্ত্ৰীয়ে এই মন্তব্য কৰে ৷
উল্লেখযোগ্য যে, বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়খনৰ আন্তঃগাঁথনি উন্নয়ন সন্দৰ্ভত উপাচাৰ্য ড০ মহাদেৱ পাটগিৰিৰ সৈতে আলোচনাত মিলিত হয় ডা০ পেগু। বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়খনৰ আন্তঃগাঁথনি উন্নয়নৰ বাবে বিগত সময়ছোৱাত চৰকাৰে প্ৰদান কৰা ১০ কোটি টকাৰ ব্যয়ৰ খতিয়ান লয় মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে।
সাংবাদিকৰ আগত মন্ত্ৰী ডা০ পেগুৱে গুৱাহাটী বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়সহ কেতবোৰ মহাবিদ্যালয় আৰ্থিক সংকটত পৰা বুলি উঠা অভিযোগ সন্দৰ্ভত প্ৰতিক্ৰিয়া প্ৰকাশ কৰি কয়- পুঁজিৰ জোৰা মৰাতো বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়, স্বায়ত্তশাসিত মহাবিদ্যালয়সমূহৰ নিজৰ দায়িত্ব। যদি কিবা কৰিবলগীয়া থাকে আগলৈ বিষয়টো বিবেচনা কৰা হ'ব। 
অন্যহাতে চৰকাৰী প্ৰাথমিক বিদ্যালয়ৰ ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক যোগান ধৰা বিনামূলীয়া ইউনিফৰ্মত অধিক পলিষ্টাৰ মিহলি হৈ থকা বুলি অভিভাৱকসকলে যি আপত্তি দৰ্শাই আহিছে তাকলৈয়ো প্ৰতিক্ৰিয়া প্ৰকাশ কৰে। যিমানেই পলিষ্টাৰ কমাই দিয়া হ'ব, সিমানেই পুঁজি বেছি লাগিব। এতিয়া সিমান বাজেট নাই বুলি শিক্ষা মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে কয় ৷
ইপিনে মহাবিদ্যালয়সমূহত ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীৰ বিনামূলীয়া নামভৰ্তিৰ বাবদ চৰকাৰে যি ১০ শতাংশ ধন এতিয়াও দিবলৈ বাকী আছে সেয়া বাজেট অধিৱেশনৰ পিছতে মোকলাই দিয়াৰ আশ্বাস দিয়ে মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে।

title: 2 Killed, 2 Injured In Lightning Strikes In Jharkhand

description:
ଲଣ୍ଡନ, ୨୮।୬: ଚଳିତ ମହିଳା ଟି୨୦ କ୍ରିକେଟ ବିଶ୍ୱକପର ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ଭାରତ ଅଭିଯାନ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି। ରବିବାର ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ଅନ୍ତିମ ଲିଗ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାଚରେ ଭାରତକୁ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ୬ ଉଇକେଟରେ ପରାସ୍ତ କରିଛି। ଭାରତ ୨୦ ଓଭରରେ ୪ ଉଇକେଟ ହରାଇ ୧୭୦ ରନ କରିଥିଲା। ଜବାବରେ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ୧୯ ଓଭରରେ ୪ ଉଇକେଟ ହରାଇ ୧୭୨ ରନ ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରି ନେଇଥିଲା। ପ୍ଲେୟର ଅଫ୍‌ ଦି ମ୍ୟାଚ ଏଲିସ ପେରୀ ୫୬ ଓ ଆଶଲେ ଗାର୍ଡନର […]
The post ଟି୨୦ ବିଶ୍ୱକପରେ ଭାରତର ଅଭିଯାନ ଶେଷ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଲଣ୍ଡନ, ୨୮।୬: ଚଳିତ ମହିଳା ଟି୨୦ କ୍ରିକେଟ ବିଶ୍ୱକପର ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ଭାରତ ଅଭିଯାନ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି। ରବିବାର ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ଅନ୍ତିମ ଲିଗ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାଚରେ ଭାରତକୁ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ୬ ଉଇକେଟରେ ପରାସ୍ତ କରିଛି। ଭାରତ ୨୦ ଓଭରରେ ୪ ଉଇକେଟ ହରାଇ ୧୭୦ ରନ କରିଥିଲା। ଜବାବରେ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ୧୯ ଓଭରରେ ୪ ଉଇକେଟ ହରାଇ ୧୭୨ ରନ ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରି ନେଇଥିଲା।
ପ୍ଲେୟର ଅଫ୍‌ ଦି ମ୍ୟାଚ ଏଲିସ ପେରୀ ୫୬ ଓ ଆଶଲେ ଗାର୍ଡନର ୫୩* ରନ୍‌ କରି ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ବିଜୟରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌-୧ରୁ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ୫ ମ୍ୟାଚରୁ ୧୦ ଓ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆଫ୍ରିକା ୮ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ପାଇ ସେମିଫାଇନାଲରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିଛି। ଭାରତ ୬ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ସହ ବିଦା ହୋଇଛି। ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌-୨ରୁ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଓ ଓ୍ବେଷ୍ଟଇଣ୍ଡିଜ ଯଥାକ୍ରମେ ୧୦ ଓ ୬ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ସହିତ ସେମିଫାଇନାଲରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛନ୍ତି। ଭାରତୀୟ ଦଳ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ, ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍ସ ଓ ବାଂଲାଦେଶକୁ ହରାଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆଫ୍ରିକା ଓ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆଠାରୁ ପରାଜିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ବାଂଲାଦେଶ ବିପକ୍ଷରେ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆଫ୍ରିକାର ବିଜୟ ପରେ ଭାରତ ପାଇଁ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ବିପକ୍ଷ ମ୍ୟାଚ ଜିତିବା ଜରୁରୀ ହୋଇ ପଡ଼ିଥିଲା। ମାତ୍ର ପେରୀ ଓ ଗାର୍ଡନରଙ୍କ ଶତକୀୟ ଭାଗୀଦାରି ଭାରତ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ପ୍ରାଚୀର ସଦୃଶ ଛିଡ଼ା ହୋଇଥିଲା। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଭାରତୀୟ ଇନିଂସରେ କେବଳ ଅଧିନାୟିକା ହରମନପ୍ରୀତ ସିଂ ଅର୍ଦ୍ଧଶତକ ହାସଲ କରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ୨୭ ବଲ୍‌ରୁ ୫୬ ରନ କରିଥିଲେ।
The post ଟି୨୦ ବିଶ୍ୱକପରେ ଭାରତର ଅଭିଯାନ ଶେଷ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: କ୍ରିକେଟ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟ, ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ବିଜୟୀ, ଖେଳାଳିଙ୍କୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କଲେ ବିଧାୟକ
description:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୨୮।୬(ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପି ସାମଲ): ଛତ୍ରପୁର ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଟି. ନୂଆଁଗାଁ ପଡ଼ିଆରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଶ୍ରୀଶ୍ରୀ ବାବା ଅଗସ୍ତିଶ୍ୱର କ୍ରିକେଟ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟ ରବିବାର ଉଦଯାପିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଫାଇନାଲ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ରଙ୍ଗେଈଲୁଣ୍ଡା ଏବଂ ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ଦଳ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କଡା ମୁକାବିଲା ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ଟିମ୍‌ ବିଜୟୀ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ରଙ୍ଗେଈଲୁଣ୍ଡା ଟିମ ପରାଜିତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଉଦ୍‌ଯାପନୀ ସମାରୋହରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅତିଥି ଭାବେ ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ବିଧାୟକ ରମେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଜେନା ଯୋଗଦେଇ ଖେଳାଳିମାନଙ୍କୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ […]
The post କ୍ରିକେଟ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟ, ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ବିଜୟୀ, ଖେଳାଳିଙ୍କୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କଲେ ବିଧାୟକ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୨୮।୬(ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପି ସାମଲ): ଛତ୍ରପୁର ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଟି. ନୂଆଁଗାଁ ପଡ଼ିଆରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଶ୍ରୀଶ୍ରୀ ବାବା ଅଗସ୍ତିଶ୍ୱର କ୍ରିକେଟ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟ ରବିବାର ଉଦଯାପିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଫାଇନାଲ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ରଙ୍ଗେଈଲୁଣ୍ଡା ଏବଂ ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ଦଳ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କଡା ମୁକାବିଲା ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ଟିମ୍‌ ବିଜୟୀ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ରଙ୍ଗେଈଲୁଣ୍ଡା ଟିମ ପରାଜିତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଉଦ୍‌ଯାପନୀ ସମାରୋହରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅତିଥି ଭାବେ ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ବିଧାୟକ ରମେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଜେନା ଯୋଗଦେଇ ଖେଳାଳିମାନଙ୍କୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି ତଥା ପୂର୍ବତନ ଜିଲାପରିଷଦ ସଭ୍ୟ ମୁନା ଦାସ, ଶ୍ରମିକ ନେତା ଶଙ୍କର ପ୍ରସାଦ ଦାଶ, ଯୁବ ବିଜେଡି ରାଜ୍ୟ ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ବିମଳ କୁମାର ପଣ୍ଡା, ଯୁବନେତା ଟି. ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଶେଖର ରାଓ, ଛତ୍ରପୁର ବ୍ଲକ ବିଜେଡି ସଭାପତି ଏସ. ଚକ୍ରପାଣି ରେଡ୍ଡୀ, ଚମାଖଣ୍ଡି ସରପଞ୍ଚ ସିଏଚ୍‌. ମନୋଜ କୁମାର ରେଡ୍ଡୀ, ବି. ଲିଙ୍ଗରାଜ ପାତ୍ର, ରାଜେଶ ମହାରଣାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ବହୁ ମାନ୍ୟଗଣ୍ୟ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ମାନେ ଯୋଗଦେଇ ଥିଲେ।
ଏହି ଅବସର ଆୟୋଜକ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ବିଜୟୀ ଦଳକୁ ଟ୍ରଫି ସହ ୩୦ ହଜାର ଓ ପରାଜିତା ଦଳକୁ ଟ୍ରଫି ସହ ୨୦ ହଜାର ଟଙ୍କା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା । ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟରେ ୮ ଟି ଦଳ ଏହି ଅଂଶ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏଥିରେ ରାଜ୍ୟ ବାହାରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ୍ୟ କିଛି ଦଳ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟକୁ ଶ୍ରୀରାମ ଦାସ, ଅରୁଣ ଦାସଙ୍କ ସହ ଯୁବଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ପରିଚାଳନା କରିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭରେ ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ବିଧାୟକ ଜେନାଙ୍କୁ ପୂର୍ବତନ ଜିଲା ପରିଷଦ ସଭ୍ୟ ମୁନା ଦାସଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱରେ ବିଶାଳ ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟସ୍ଥଳକୁ ପାଛୋଟି ଅଣାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଅବସର ବହୁ ଜନଗହଳି ହୋଇଥିଲା।
The post କ୍ରିକେଟ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟ, ସୋମପେଣ୍ଠା ବିଜୟୀ, ଖେଳାଳିଙ୍କୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କଲେ ବିଧାୟକ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: নাও চলাচলৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত নিষেধাজ্ঞা জাৰি চিৰাং জিলা প্ৰশাসনৰ
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, চিৰাং : বিগত দুদিন ধৰি হৈ থকা নেৰানেপেৰা বৰষুণৰ ফলত চিৰাং জিলাৰ কেইবাখনো নৈৰ জলপৃষ্ঠ বৃদ্ধি পোৱা পৰিলক্ষিত হৈছে । বাৰিষাৰ এই সময়ছোৱাত জনসাধাৰণৰ জীৱন আৰু সা-সম্পত্তিৰ সুৰক্ষাৰ প্ৰতি লক্ষ্য ৰাখি জিলাৰ আয়ুক্ত গকুল চন্দ্ৰ ব্ৰহ্মই জিলাখনৰ আই, চম্পাৱতী নৈসহ জিলাখনৰ মাজেদি বৈ যোৱা অন্যান্য নৈত যাত্ৰী বা সা-সামগ্ৰী কঢ়িয়াই নিয়া যন্ত্ৰচালিত নাও বা তুলুঙা নাও চলাচল কৰাৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত ধাৰা ৩৪ (বি) দুৰ্যোগ ব্যৱস্থাপনা আইন -২০০৫ ৰ অধীনত বাধা নিষেধ আৰোপ কৰা হৈছে ।
২৮ জুন,২০২৬ ৰ পৰা ০৪ জুলাই, ২০২৬ ইং এই সাতদিন জিলাখনৰ আই, চম্পাৱতী নৈসহ অন্যান্য নৈসমূহত নাও চলাচল সম্পূৰ্ণ বন্ধ ৰখাৰ নিৰ্দেশ জাৰি কৰিছে। জিলা প্ৰশাসনৰ এই নিৰ্দেশ অমান্য কৰি যদি কোনোবাই নৈত নাও চলাচল কৰে তেন্তে তাৰ বিৰুদ্ধে আইনী ব্যৱস্থা গ্ৰহণ কৰা হ'ব বুলি জাননীখনত উল্লেখ কৰা হৈছে ।

title: Katy Perry apologises after Werchter Boutique headline set cancelled due to severe weather warnings
description:
"The safety of all 55,000 of you always comes first and foremost”
The post Katy Perry apologises after Werchter Boutique headline set cancelled due to severe weather warnings appeared first on NME.
content:
Katy Perry has apologised to fans after her headline set at Belgium’s Werchter Boutique was cancelled due to severe weather warnings.
The singer had been set to headline the one-day festival at Festivalpark Werchter last night (June 27), but organisers finished the event early due to the threat of severe thunderstorms.
“The festival will end after Pitbull’s performance. Katy Perry’s concert will not go ahead,” they said in a statement. “By bringing the festival to a close early, we can ensure that the exit of visitors proceeds in a safe and orderly manner, allowing everyone to return home calmly. The safety and health of everyone present is always our top priority.”
Perry later shared her own statement on Instagram, saying she had been backstage preparing for the show when she was told it could not go ahead.
“Sadly my set @WerchterBoutique tonight can’t happen due to a government mandated cancellation because of the incoming inclement weather and crowd safety concerns,” she wrote.
“I was backstage at the show in the middle of hair and makeup when this news was delivered, and they gave me no choice. I am just as unhappy as you are.”
She added: “Unfortunately this is beyond my control, but the safety of all 55,000 of you always comes first and foremost.”

  










View this post on Instagram

























Perry also said she had been looking forward to returning to the Belgian festival after 17 years, and had planned to wear the same outfit she wore during her 2009 appearance.
“I love you all, and please get home safe,” she concluded.
Werchter Boutique later issued an update saying that “a severe storm passed over the country” after the festival was closed, and that everyone had been able to leave the site safely.
Perry’s next scheduled performance is at Cardiff Castle on Tuesday (June 30), one of only two exclusive UK dates she has announced for the summer.
It follows her recent appearance at the FIFA World Cup 2026 US opening ceremony in Los Angeles, where she performed ‘Wonder’ alongside young Norwegian singer Tius.
Perry also released her latest single ‘Watch It Burn’ last week. The track was previously previewed during her Rock In Rio Lisbon headline set, where she told the crowd she had “lost her roar” last year before playing an emotional acoustic version of ‘Roar’.
In NME’s review of Rock In Rio Lisbon, Perry was described as delivering a “pure pop spectacle”, with the review adding that the performance showed why pop’s newer stars cite her as an influence.
In April, Australian police began investigating Ruby Rose’s claims that Perry sexually assaulted her in a Melbourne nightclub over a decade ago. Perry’s representatives have denied the allegations, calling them “dangerous, reckless” and “categorically false”.
The post Katy Perry apologises after Werchter Boutique headline set cancelled due to severe weather warnings appeared first on NME.

title: Iran is forcing the U.S. into an escalation trap as a ‘shadow war’ over the Strait of Hormuz heats up that could kill the tenuous ceasefire
description: "The collision course is set, and worse is yet to come."
content:
The U.S.-Iran ceasefire was already not much of a ceasefire as missiles, drones, and bombs continue exploding around the Persian Gulf. 



But this week’s latest exchange of fire over who controls the Strait of Hormuz threatens to snuff out the deal just weeks after it was signed.



On Sunday, Iran launched new attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain, while threatening a “complete halt” to peace talks. It continuined a tit-for-tat cycle of retaliation after U.S. airstrikes punished the regime for targeting commercial ships with drones.



The renewed skirmishes come as Iran seeks to shut down an alternate route through the strait that’s protected by the U.S. and bypasses a Tehran-backed channel meant to normalize its control over the vital energy chokepoint.



Over the weekend, the alternate route, which hugs the Omani coast, was expanded to accommodate both inbound and outbound traffic. That further dilutes Iran’s hold over the strait—its top source of leverage.



President Donald Trump has called Iran’s actions a violation of the ceasefire and threatened devastating consequences. But he has also signaled reluctance to go back to war and hasn’t followed through on similar threats.



“Iran is choking Hormuz, forcing a brutal choice: escalate or surrender control,” University of Chicago political science professor Robert Pape posted on X. “Trump wants out, but Iran is forcing the ‘escalation trap.’ The collision course is set, and worse is yet to come.”



For now, the U.S. Navy appears to be making of a point of showing that the alternate route is still safe, as Gulf traffic data Sunday revealed a convoy of tankers heading through the strait under escort with their transponders turned on.



Other ships have likely switched off their transponders to quietly slip through the waterway undetected. But the mere threat of Iranian attacks could scare away enough ships to effectively shut down the strait.



Pape explained that Iran’s strategic logic is to force the strait to stay mostly closed and cut off oil flows again, requiring the U.S. to draw down its inventories. That would provide Iran more leverage as it tries to drive the U.S. military out of the region.



Commercial shipping companies are also caught in a trap. They could use the alternate route and risk Iranian attacks, or use the regime’s route and face Western sanctions against transacting with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps.



Since many ships have no choice but to use the alternate channel and are transiting under the radar, Iran will have to keep escalating in order to completely halt flows, according to HFI Research.



“For the US, the fact that the Oman route might be blocked presents it with a big ultimatum: either the US escalates or gives IRGC control of the Strait of Hormuz. Logic says there’s no way that would happen, so escalation will continue,” it posted on X.



“Given that Trump has made it obvious that he does not want to escalate, I fear that the IRGC would just keep escalating until they gain control. This issue is far from over.”



University of Oslo professor Francesco Sassi pointed out that Iran’s latest attack on shipping specifically targeted a vital workaround that Gulf oil producers have employed: ship-to-ship transfers of oil at sea that bypass Hormuz.



That sets up an existential test for U.S. deterrence capability to protect regional allies like Bahrain and Kuwait, he wrote on X on Sunday, adding that a return to the pre-conflict status quo is officially dead.



“The war for the Strait of Hormuz has entered a highly dangerous new phase,” Sassi warned. “Following consecutive nights of US retaliatory strikes against IRGC targets, a shadow war is rapidly expanding to the outer rim of the Gulf.”



In fact, Iran has no intention of going back to business as usual in the strait, Noam Raydan, senior fellow at the Washington Institute think tank, wrote in a blog post on Friday.



That’s because returning to prewar conditions would deprive Iran of its strongest remaining source of leverage, she added.



“The question now is not how Iran will facilitate a return to a status quo that does not serve its objectives,” Raydan explained. “Rather, policymakers must prepare for the justifications Tehran will put forward to ensure that it plays a central role in the new maritime system, and the barriers it will put in place to impede any alternative systems.”
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: ସରକାରୀ ଚାକିରି ଦେବା ନାମରେ ୨୩ ଲକ୍ଷ ଠକେଇ
description:
କେନ୍ଦୁଝର,୨୬ା୬(ନରେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ସଦର ପୋଲିସ ଚାକିରି ଦେବା ନାମରେ ଠକେଇ ମାମଲାର ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାଶ କରିଛି। ଘଟଣାରେ ଜଡ଼ିତ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜଣକ କଟକ ଜିଲା କିଶୋର ନଗର ଥାନାର ସାନ୍ତରାପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ସମୀର କୁମାର ବର୍ମନ। ସେ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସଚିବାଳୟରେ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ବିଭାଗର ଜଣେ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଭାବେ ପରିଚୟ ଦେଇ ଅନେକ ଆଶାୟୀଙ୍କୁ ଠକିଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ତଦନ୍ତ କରି ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ୧୦ ଜଣଙ୍କଠାରୁ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସରକାରୀ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବାର […]
The post ସରକାରୀ ଚାକିରି ଦେବା ନାମରେ ୨୩ ଲକ୍ଷ ଠକେଇ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
କେନ୍ଦୁଝର,୨୬ା୬(ନରେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ସଦର ପୋଲିସ ଚାକିରି ଦେବା ନାମରେ ଠକେଇ ମାମଲାର ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାଶ କରିଛି। ଘଟଣାରେ ଜଡ଼ିତ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜଣକ କଟକ ଜିଲା କିଶୋର ନଗର ଥାନାର ସାନ୍ତରାପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ସମୀର କୁମାର ବର୍ମନ। ସେ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସଚିବାଳୟରେ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ବିଭାଗର ଜଣେ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଭାବେ ପରିଚୟ ଦେଇ ଅନେକ ଆଶାୟୀଙ୍କୁ ଠକିଥିଲେ।
ପୋଲିସ ତଦନ୍ତ କରି ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ୧୦ ଜଣଙ୍କଠାରୁ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସରକାରୀ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବାର ମିଥ୍ୟା ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଦେଇ ମୋଟ ୨୩,୯୭,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ନେଇଥିବା ଜାଣିଥିଲା।
ପୀଡ଼ିତମାନେ ନଗଦ ଏବଂ ଡିଜିଟାଲ କାରବାର ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଟଙ୍କା ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଚାକିରି ଦେଲେ ନାହିଁ କିମ୍ବା ଟଙ୍କା ଫେରସ୍ତ କରି ନ ଥିଲେ। ତେବେ ୮୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଆଂଶିକ ପୀଡ଼ିତଙ୍କ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ହାସଲ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ପରିଶୋଧ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏପରିକି କେତେଜଣ ପ୍ରାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ନ କଲି ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ପତ୍ର ଜାରି କରିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ହୋଇଛି। ତଦନ୍ତ ସମୟରେ ପୋଲିସ ଫୋନ ପେ, କାରବାର ରେକର୍ଡ, ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଜମା ସ୍ଲିପ, ଚେକ୍‌ ବିବରଣୀ ଏବଂ ନକଲି ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ପତ୍ର ସମେତ ଡକ୍ୟୁମେଣ୍ଟାରୀ ପ୍ରମାଣ ଜବତ କରିଛି। ଭାରତୀୟ ନ୍ୟାୟ ସଂହିତାର ଧାରା ୩୧୮(୪)/୩୧୯(୨)/୩୩୬(୩)/୩୪୦(୨)ରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରି ଅଧିକ ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛି। ଘଟଣାରେ ଅଧିକ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରହିଥିବା ଥାନା ଅଧିକାରୀ ଅମିତ୍‌ କୁମାର ଭୂୟଁା କହିଛନ୍ତି।
The post ସରକାରୀ ଚାକିରି ଦେବା ନାମରେ ୨୩ ଲକ୍ଷ ଠକେଇ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

ତିରୁମାଲା ମନ୍ଦିର ସୁପ୍ରଭାତ ସେବାରେ ଯୋଗଦେଲେ ଅନନ୍ତ ଅମ୍ବାନୀ, କଲେ ମୁଣ୍ଡନ
description:
ତିରୁମାଲା,୨୮।୬: ରିଲାଏନ୍ସ ଇଣ୍ଡଷ୍ଟ୍ରିଜ୍‌ର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟନିର୍ବାହୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ଅନନ୍ତ ଅମ୍ବାନୀ ରବିବାର ତିରୁମାଲାର ପାହାଡ଼ରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ପବିତ୍ର ଭଗବାନ ଭେଙ୍କଟେଶ୍ୱରଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ପୂଜାର୍ଚ୍ଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଅନନ୍ତ ତିରୁମାଲାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଭଗବାନ ଭେଙ୍କଟେଶ୍ୱର ସ୍ବାମୀଙ୍କ ନିକଟରେ ମୁଣ୍ଡନ କରାଇବାର ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ପୁରୁଣା ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ କରିଥିଲେ। ଉକ୍ତ ସମର୍ପଣ ଓ ଭକ୍ତିର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରତିବର୍ଷ ଉକ୍ତ ମନ୍ଦିରକୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ଲକ୍ଷ ଲକ୍ଷ ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା କରାଯାଇଥାଏ । ତାଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦର୍ଶନ ସ୍ମରଣ କରାଇଦେଇଛି ଯେ, ବିଶ୍ୱ ଯେତେ […]
The post ତିରୁମାଲା ମନ୍ଦିର ସୁପ୍ରଭାତ ସେବାରେ ଯୋଗଦେଲେ ଅନନ୍ତ ଅମ୍ବାନୀ, କଲେ ମୁଣ୍ଡନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ତିରୁମାଲା,୨୮।୬: ରିଲାଏନ୍ସ ଇଣ୍ଡଷ୍ଟ୍ରିଜ୍‌ର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟନିର୍ବାହୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ଅନନ୍ତ ଅମ୍ବାନୀ ରବିବାର ତିରୁମାଲାର ପାହାଡ଼ରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ପବିତ୍ର ଭଗବାନ ଭେଙ୍କଟେଶ୍ୱରଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ପୂଜାର୍ଚ୍ଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଅନନ୍ତ ତିରୁମାଲାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଭଗବାନ ଭେଙ୍କଟେଶ୍ୱର ସ୍ବାମୀଙ୍କ ନିକଟରେ ମୁଣ୍ଡନ କରାଇବାର ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ପୁରୁଣା ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ କରିଥିଲେ। ଉକ୍ତ ସମର୍ପଣ ଓ ଭକ୍ତିର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରତିବର୍ଷ ଉକ୍ତ ମନ୍ଦିରକୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ଲକ୍ଷ ଲକ୍ଷ ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା କରାଯାଇଥାଏ । ତାଙ୍କ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦର୍ଶନ ସ୍ମରଣ କରାଇଦେଇଛି ଯେ, ବିଶ୍ୱ ଯେତେ ବି ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଘଟିଲେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା, ମଣିଷର ଆସ୍ଥା ଏବଂ ମୂଳ ପୃଷ୍ଠଭୂମି ଏବେବି ତିଷ୍ଠି ରହିଛି।

ଅନନ୍ତ ଭୋର୍‌ ୩.୩୦ରେ, ମନ୍ଦିରର ଅଧିଷ୍ଠାତା ଦେବତାଙ୍କ ଜାଗରଣକୁ ସୂଚାଉଥିବା ପବିତ୍ର ସୁପ୍ରଭାତ ସେବାରେ ଭାଗ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ଦର୍ଶନ ପରେ ମନ୍ଦିର ପୂଜକ ତାଙ୍କୁ ବୈଦିକ ଶୁଭାଶୀର୍ବାଦ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା ସହ ତିରୁମାଲା ତିରୁପତି ଦେବସ୍ଥାନମ୍‌ (ଟିଟିଡି)ର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟନିର୍ବାହୀ ଅଧିକାରୀ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଉପହାରସ୍ବରୂପ ପବିତ୍ର ସ୍ମାରକୀ ଓ ପ୍ରସାଦ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଥିଲେ।

ଏହି ପରିଦର୍ଶନର ଏକ ଅଂଶବିଶେଷ ସ୍ବରୂପ, ଅନନ୍ତ ମନ୍ଦିରର ଗୋଶାଳାରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପୂଜାର୍ଚ୍ଚନା କରିବା ସହିତ ଗୋବଂଶ ଓ ହାତୀଙ୍କ ସହ ସମୟ ବିତାଇଥିଲେ। ପରେ, ପ୍ରାତଃ ୬.୩୦ ଘଟିକାରେ ତିରୁପତି ପ୍ରସ୍ଥାନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଶ୍ରୀ ପଦ୍ମାବତୀ ଅମ୍ମାଭରୀ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ପୂଜା କରି ସେ ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ଯାତ୍ରାକୁ ସମାପନ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅନନ୍ତଙ୍କ ଏହି ଗସ୍ତ ଭାରତର ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ପରମ୍ପରା ଏବଂ ସାଂସ୍କୃତିକ ଐତିହ୍ୟ ପ୍ରତି ନିରନ୍ତର ପ୍ରତିବଦ୍ଧତାକୁ ପ୍ରତିଫଳିତ କରିଥିଲା। ଯେଉଁଠି ସେ ଦେଶର ଅନ୍ୟତମ ପରମ ପବିତ୍ର ତୀର୍ଥସ୍ଥଳରେ ଭୋର୍‌ରେ ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ ହେଉଥିବା ରୀତିନୀତିରେ ସହସ୍ରାଧିକ ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁଙ୍କ ସହଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ।

 
Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily
The post ତିରୁମାଲା ମନ୍ଦିର ସୁପ୍ରଭାତ ସେବାରେ ଯୋଗଦେଲେ ଅନନ୍ତ ଅମ୍ବାନୀ, କଲେ ମୁଣ୍ଡନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Television icon Tom Verlaine’s huge personal record collection to go on sale
description:
4000 records from the late guitarist's eclectic archive have been made available
The post Television icon Tom Verlaine’s huge personal record collection to go on sale appeared first on NME.
content:
Television frontman Tom Verlaine’s personal 4,000-strong record collection has gone on sale.
The iconic guitarist passed away in January 2023 at the age of 73, and now his extensive archive of vinyl records is being made available to the public, offering fans a glimpse into the music taste of the trailblazing New York band.
The first batch of records became available through Discogs on Friday (June 26), with further titles set to be sold in person at Academy Records’ Banker Street location in Brooklyn on July 10 and 11.
Any remaining records will then return to Discogs on July 31. Purchases made through Discogs will include a certificate of authenticity confirming that the record came from Verlaine’s personal collection. Check out the collection here.
The collection spans jazz, avant-garde, garage rock, psychedelia and experimental, and includes Verlaine’s personal copies of Television’s debut single ‘Little Johnny Jewel’ and their landmark 1977 debut album ‘Marquee Moon’, alongside records by The 13th Floor Elevators, Nico, Albert Ayler, The Sonics, Love and Slint.

  










View this post on Instagram

























“What’s interesting to me about Verlaine’s collection is how much more of an X-ray it is than a mirror image,” Academy Records co-owner Cory Feierman said in a statement.
He added that the archive “maps a constant and active engagement with music”, saying Verlaine seemed to buy records “in more of a spirit of adventure and discovery than to knock down his own holy grails”.
Russ Ryan of Discogs said the records had come to Academy because Verlaine “trusted the shop”, adding that Verlaine had known Academy’s Mike Davis and Feierman for around 20 years.
“A lifetime of his digging is in these 4,000 records, and our job is to keep them in circulation rather than let them vanish into a vault,” he said.
Tributes were paid by a range of legendary artists in the aftermath of Verlaine’s death in 2023, including Michael Stipe, Flea, Kim Gordon and Steve Albini.
Patti Smith also paid tribute to him in an essay, writing: “There was no one like Tom. The love in his eyes and his turtle laugh.”
Television were one of the defining bands of the 1970s New York punk scene, emerging from CBGB alongside the likes of Smith, Ramones, Blondie and Talking Heads. Their debut album ‘Marquee Moon’ is widely regarded as one of the most influential guitar records of the era.
The band released just one more album during their original run, 1978’s ‘Adventure’, before splitting that year. They later reformed in 1992 for a self-titled third album and continued to tour intermittently in the decades that followed.
Earlier this year, tributes were also paid to Television bassist and original Blondie member Fred Smith, who died in February at the age of 77.
The post Television icon Tom Verlaine’s huge personal record collection to go on sale appeared first on NME.

title: ৰাঙলু এঘাৰ মাইলত ভয়ংকৰ পথ দুৰ্ঘটনা...
description:
ৰাঙলু এঘাৰ মাইলত ভয়ঙ্কৰ পথ দুৰ্ঘটনা। 
নগাঁৱৰ পৰা ডৱকা অভিমুখে তীব্ৰ বেগেৰ গৈ থকা AS 11Q 3295 নম্বৰৰ বাহনখনে নিয়ন্ত্ৰণ হেৰুৱাই বাগৰি পৰে।
বাহনখনে এঘাৰ মাইলৰ বজাৰৰ সমীপৰ ডিভাইদাৰত খুন্দিয়াই বাগৰি পৰে ৷
দুৰ্ঘটনাগ্ৰস্থ বাহনখন যথেষ্ট পৰিমাণে ক্ষয়ক্ষতি হোৱাৰ লগতে কথমপি ৰক্ষা পৰে বাহনখনত থকা তিনিজন লোকৰ ৷
ঘটনাস্থলীত ৰাঙলু আৰক্ষীৰ লোক উপস্থিত হৈ দুৰ্ঘটনাগ্ৰস্ত বাহনখন উদ্ধাৰ কৰে ৷

title: France wearing green for the Statue of Liberty: inside the unusual interpretation of ‘national pride’ that makes World Cup jerseys
description: Nike's Liberté away kit uses its mint hue to reframe a 140-year-old diplomatic gift as a statement of national identity on American soil.
content:
Heat. Moisture. National pride.



These were top of mind as Nike designed its uniform kits for this year’s World Cup, including for football powerhouses France and Brazil as well as the U.S. and Canada in their role as host nations.



In a tournament that has seen storm delays and temperatures hovering around 90 degrees Fahrenheit (32 Celsius) in some locations, the first step was to ensure players’ performance and comfort.



Phil McCartney, chief innovation, design and product officer for Nike, said the company worked with athletes, coaches and football federations to understand how uniforms affect the game.



“We also talk to fans — so what does it mean to wear a Uruguay jersey, what does it mean to represent France, what does it mean to play for Canada?” McCartney told The Associated Press. “We take that and we merge that with all the science and the innovation to make sure that we have beautiful designs.”



Adidas, which designed jerseys for defending champion Argentina, host nation Mexico and Colombia, also unveiled cooling gear for the tournament. Puma designed the kits for Portugal as well as Morocco and Senegal, the two finalists at the most recent African Cup of Nations.



While the three companies are behind most of this year’s kits, some teams are sporting uniforms designed by other apparel makers.



Testing facility features thermal chambers and robot mannequins



On a recent morning, McCartney spoke from the sports research lab at Nike’s headquarters just outside Portland, Oregon, where experimentation helped the kits come to life.



The indoor facility includes a 200-meter (219-yard) track, a small football pitch and a basketball court, with hundreds of motion-capture cameras placed throughout. Thermal chambers replicate the effects of heat and humidity on apparel donned by people or robot mannequins.



“We take motion-capture to see how they’re moving in the kit, how the kits are responding,” McCartney said. “We also use the thermal chambers that we have to test the kit’s breathability, to test wicking and moisture management.”



For the World Cup kits, Nike engineered a new fabric that it says is more breathable and made from fully recycled materials. The way the jerseys are knit, with mesh stitching in certain areas allowing more air flow, helps “get that thermal regulation that all the players have been asking for,” McCartney said.



Despite all the testing, the rollout of the kit was still a bit bumpy.



During matches earlier this year, bulges could be seen in the shoulder seams on jerseys for teams including France and Uruguay, the Guardian reported.



When asked by AP, Nike said it was able to identify the issue before the start of the World Cup, and worked with federations “to ensure kits show up as intended.”



Designs incorporate symbols of national pride



While a kit’s physical attributes are important for athletes, its appearance is just as significant for fans who sport the jerseys and want to feel connected to their team.



“We take inspiration from lots of different places, from the past, from art, from music, from culture, so anything that gets us connected to the country we really want to harness,” McCartney said.



France’s away kit, for example, is a light green akin to the Statue of Liberty, which France gifted to the U.S. in the late 19th century. The interior tag features the word “Liberté” inside a silhouette of the monument’s crown.



On the front of the jersey there’s a rooster — an emblem of the national team and the country itself — and two stars representing France’s two previous World Cup victories.



France’s home kit features a collar — as does Uruguay’s. The decision to use collars comes from the federations, Nike said, with France leaning into its history as a fashion capital and Uruguay looking to evoke a more classic football look. In previous decades, many uniforms included collars.



Key national symbols were also considered when designing kits for the U.S. and Canada. The home kit for the U.S. features horizontal red and white stripes reminiscent of a waving American flag, while Canada’s displays a prominent maple leaf.



“Especially in an event like the World Cup, we really play into national pride,” McCartney said.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

The post ଅଚାନକ ଅବସର ନେଲେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଅଧିନାୟକ ବେନ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ୱେଲିଂଟନ,୨୮।୬: ନ୍ୟୁଜିଲାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ତୃତୀୟ ଟେଷ୍ଟରେ କ୍ରିକେଟକୁ ବିଦାୟ ଦେଇ ଅଲ୍‌ରାଉଣ୍ଡର ତଥା ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଟେଷ୍ଟ ଅଧିନାୟକ ବେନ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟଜନକ ଭାବେ ଅବସର ନେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ କ୍ରିକେଟ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ଏକ ପୋଷ୍ଟ ସେୟାର କରି ବେନ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ଅବସରକୁ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ କ୍ରିକେଟ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ଏକ ପୋଷ୍ଟ ସେୟାର କରି କହିଛି, ଯେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡର ସର୍ବକାଳୀନ ମହାନ ଅଧିନାୟକ ବେନ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ଟେଷ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଶେଷରେ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ କ୍ରିକେଟରୁ ଅବସର ନେବାକୁ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇଛନ୍ତି। ବେନ୍‌, ଆପଣ ଏହି ଦଳ ପାଇଁ ସବୁଠାରୁ ପ୍ରେରଣାଦାୟକ ଅଧିନାୟକ। ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ବହୁତ ଭଲ ପାଉଛୁ ଏବଂ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଅବସର ସମୟରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଶୁଭକାମନା ଜଣାଉଛୁ।
ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଏବଂ ନ୍ୟୁଜିଲାଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ତୃତୀୟ ଟେଷ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାଚ ନଟିଂହାମରେ ଖେଳାଯାଉଛି। ଏହି ଟେଷ୍ଟର ଚତୁର୍ଥ ଦିନରେ, ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଅଧିନାୟକ ବେନ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ହଠାତ୍‌ ତାଙ୍କର ଅବସର ଘୋଷଣା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଟେଷ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାଚ ତାଙ୍କ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ କ୍ୟାରିୟରର ଶେଷ ମ୍ୟାଚ ହେବ। ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏକଦିବସୀୟ ଏବଂ ଟି-୨୦ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟରୁ ଅବସର ନେଇସାରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ କେବଳ ଟେଷ୍ଟ କ୍ରିକେଟ ଖେଳୁଥିଲେ। ସେ ଟେଷ୍ଟ କ୍ରିକେଟରେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡର ଅଧିନାୟକ ମଧ୍ୟ। କିନ୍ତୁ ନ୍ୟୁଜିଲାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷରେ ଏହି ତୃତୀୟ ଟେଷ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାଚ ତାଙ୍କ କ୍ୟାରିୟର ଶେଷ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌।
ବେନ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ପାଇଁ ମୋଟ ୧୨୨ ଟେଷ୍ଟ ମ୍ୟାଚ ଖେଳିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ସମୟ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସେ ୧୪ ଶତକ ସହିତ ୭,୨୪୩ ରନ୍‌ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ୨୫୨ ଉଇକଟ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ସେ ଟେଷ୍ଟ କ୍ରିକେଟରେ ସବୁଠାରୁ ବିପଜ୍ଜନକ ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡରଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣେ ଥିଲେ। ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ ୧୧୪ ଦିନିକିଆରେ ୩,୬୧୯ ରନ ଏବଂ ୭୪ ଉଇକେଟ ନେଇଛନ୍ତି।
The post ଅଚାନକ ଅବସର ନେଲେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ଅଧିନାୟକ ବେନ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟୋକ୍ସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: শ্ৰীশ্ৰী বাসুদেৱ থান নৰোৱা সত্ৰত শপতগ্ৰহণ পৰ্ব...
Russia Going Through 'Difficult Period' Amid Ukraine War: Putin
description: Russian President Vladimir Putin acknowledged the difficulties Russia is currently facing due to Ukraine War but expressed optimism about overcoming these challenges.
content: Russian President Vladimir Putin on Sunday admitted that Russia is going through a "difficult period", however he expressed confidence that the country would overcome its challenges, ensure national security and continue strengthening its borders, according to Russian state news agency TASS.The Russian President, while peaking at the conference of the ruling United Russia party ahead of parliamentary elections, stated that the hardships faced by the country had made it stronger and provided valuable lessons."We are going through a difficult period, but it has taught us much," Putin said and wished the United Russia party success in the upcoming parliamentary elections, scheduled for September. Putin Vows To Overcome ChallengesStating that the government was aware of the challenges confronting the country, Putin assured that the government is taking steps to address them. "Yes, we see the problems, we are aware of them and are responding to them, but we will certainly ensure the security of both the country and our citizens, as well as the inviolability of Russia's borders," he said.The Russian President also vowed that Russia would overcome the threats and said, "We will undoubtedly overcome all the challenges facing us today, including terrorist attacks on our territory and infrastructure facilities."Putin's remarks come as Russia is facing Ukrainian drone and missile strikes. In addition to this, Moscow is also hit by Western sanctions imposed over the war in Ukraine.Ukraine's Drone Attack On RussiaUkraine launched a heavy drone assault on Russia, setting fire to a major oil refinery in the south and killing at least two people, Russian authorities said Sunday. Kyiv has reportedly stepped up its long-range attacks on Russian military industries and energy facilities in recent months, aiming to cut Moscow's revenue for its invasion."Tonight, our long-range sanctions reached two oil refineries in Russia," Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy wrote on the Telegram messaging app on Sunday. "Each (strike) means a reduction in the resources that fuel the Russian war machine, and another step toward peace."

title: KCR కుటుంబాన్ని ప్రజలు శాశ్వతంగా బహిష్కరించారు – సీఎం రేవంత్
description: KCR: తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎనుముల రేవంత్ రెడ్డి ఉమ్మడి నల్గొండ జిల్లా పర్యటనలో బీఆర్ఎస్ అధినేత కేసీఆర్, ఆయన కుటుంబంపై మునుపెన్నడూ లేనంత ఘాటుగా విరుచుకుపడ్డారు. గత...
content:
KCR: తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎనుముల రేవంత్ రెడ్డి ఉమ్మడి నల్గొండ జిల్లా పర్యటనలో బీఆర్ఎస్ అధినేత కేసీఆర్, ఆయన కుటుంబంపై మునుపెన్నడూ లేనంత ఘాటుగా విరుచుకుపడ్డారు. గత పదేళ్ల బీఆర్ఎస్ దుర్మార్గుల పాలనకు విసిగిపోయిన తెలంగాణ ప్రజలు.. కేసీఆర్ కుటుంబాన్ని రాజకీయంగా శాశ్వతంగా బహిష్కరించారని ఆయన నల్గొండ బహిరంగ సభ సాక్షిగా ప్రకటించారు. గత బీఆర్ఎస్ పాలనకు, ప్రస్తుత కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రజా ప్రభుత్వ పాలనకు మధ్య ఉన్న వ్యత్యాసంపై అసెంబ్లీ వేదికగా చర్చకు రావాలని ప్రతిపక్షానికి రేవంత్ రెడ్డి బహిరంగ సవాల్ విసిరారు. ఇరు పార్టీల ఎన్నికల మేనిఫెస్టోల అమలు, ఇచ్చిన హామీల ప్రగతిపై అసెంబ్లీలో ఎన్ని రోజులైనా సుదీర్ఘ చర్చ పెట్టడానికి తమ ప్రభుత్వం సిద్ధంగా ఉందని, దమ్ముంటే ప్రతిపక్ష నేతలు సభకు రావాలని సవాల్ విసిరారు.

CM Revanth Reddy 







ఫోన్ ట్యాపింగ్ ఉదంతంపై తీవ్ర వ్యాఖ్యలు.. ‘పాపాల భైరవుడు’ అంటూ ధ్వజం



గత బీఆర్ఎస్ ప్రభుత్వ హయాంలో జరిగిన సంచలన ఫోన్ ట్యాపింగ్ వ్యవహారాన్ని ప్రస్తావిస్తూ సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి అత్యంత తీవ్రమైన పదజాలంతో కేసీఆర్‌పై ధ్వజమెత్తారు. అధికారాన్ని అడ్డం పెట్టుకుని చివరకు భార్యాభర్తల వ్యక్తిగత ఫోన్ సంభాషణలను కూడా ట్యాప్ చేసి విన్న వికృత మనస్తత్వం వారిదని మండిపడ్డారు. “అలాంటి పాపాల భైరవుడు మళ్లీ అధికారంలోకి ఎందుకు రావాలి? సొంత పౌరుల రహస్యాలను దొంగతనంగా విన్న వాడిని ఏం చేయాలి.. చేయితో కొట్టాలా? చెప్పుతో కొట్టాలా?” అంటూ రేవంత్ రెడ్డి చేసిన సంచలన వ్యాఖ్యలు ఇప్పుడు రాష్ట్ర రాజకీయాల్లో దావానలంలా వ్యాపించాయి. పదేళ్లు రాష్ట్రాన్ని దోచుకుని, ప్రజాస్వామ్యాన్ని నిర్వీర్యం చేసిన వారు ఈరోజు ప్రజా ప్రభుత్వంపై విమర్శలు చేయడం హాస్యాస్పదమని సీఎం ఎద్దేవా చేశారు.

title: ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ ଘଟଣା: ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜେଲ ହାଜତକୁ ଗଲେ ୩, ଜଣେ ଖଲାସ
description:
ହାଟଡିହୀ/କେନ୍ଦୁଝର,୨୮।୬(ଶୁଭକାନ୍ତ ନାୟକ/ନରେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ ଘଟଣାରେ ଗିରଫ ହୋଇ କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ ହୋଇଥିବା ୪ ଜଣ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୩ ଜଣ ଜେଲ ହାଜତକୁ ଯାଇଛନ୍ତି । କିନ୍ତୁ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜେଲ ହାଜତ ଦଣ୍ଡରୁ ବାଦ ପଡିଛନ୍ତି । କାହିଁକି ଏବଂ କେଉଁ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଏପରି ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି ତାହା ଅଦ୍ୟାବଧି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇ ପାରିନି । ଅପରପକ୍ଷେ ରାତିରେ ମହିଳାଙ୍କୁ ଅଟକ ରଖାଯାଇ ପାରିବନି ବୋଲି ନିୟମ ଆଧାର ମହିଳା […]
The post ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ ଘଟଣା: ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜେଲ ହାଜତକୁ ଗଲେ ୩, ଜଣେ ଖଲାସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ହାଟଡିହୀ/କେନ୍ଦୁଝର,୨୮।୬(ଶୁଭକାନ୍ତ ନାୟକ/ନରେଶ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ ଘଟଣାରେ ଗିରଫ ହୋଇ କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ ହୋଇଥିବା ୪ ଜଣ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୩ ଜଣ ଜେଲ ହାଜତକୁ ଯାଇଛନ୍ତି । କିନ୍ତୁ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଜେଲ ହାଜତ ଦଣ୍ଡରୁ ବାଦ ପଡିଛନ୍ତି । କାହିଁକି ଏବଂ କେଉଁ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଏପରି ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି ତାହା ଅଦ୍ୟାବଧି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇ ପାରିନି । ଅପରପକ୍ଷେ ରାତିରେ ମହିଳାଙ୍କୁ ଅଟକ ରଖାଯାଇ ପାରିବନି ବୋଲି ନିୟମ ଆଧାର ମହିଳା ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଛାଡି ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା କୁହାଯାଉଛି । ଯାହାକି ଏବେ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଆଲୋଚନାର ବିଷୟ ସାଜିଛି ।
ସୂଚନା ଯୋଗ୍ୟ, କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ଥାନା ଅଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ପୋଲିସ ଗତ ଶନିବାର ୧୨ ଗ୍ରାମ ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ କରି ଏଥିରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗତ ଶନିବାର ଗିରଫ କରିଥିଲା । ସେହି ଶନିବାର ଦିନ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଏଡିଜେ କୋର୍ଟକୁ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା ।
ଗିରଫ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ଥିଲେ । ଗିରଫ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିମାନେ ନନ୍ଦିପଦା ଥାନା ହାଟଡିହୀ ଗ୍ରାମର ଭାଗିରଥି ପଣ୍ଡା (୩୦ ବର୍ଷ), ଜଳକଳଙ୍ଗ ଗ୍ରାମର ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମଲ୍ଲିକ (୨୭ ବର୍ଷ), ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଥାନା ଫକୀରପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ଦୀପ୍ତି ରଞ୍ଜନ ଜେନା (୨୭ ବର୍ଷ) ଏବଂ ବାଲେଶ୍ୱର ଜିଲା ଖଇରା ଥାନା କୁପାରୀ ଗ୍ରାମର ନିନିଲତା ମୁଖି (୬୧ ବର୍ଷ) ଅଟନ୍ତି । ପୋଲିସ ମାମଲା ନଂ ୨୭୪/୨୦୨୬ ପଞ୍ଜିକରଣ କରିଥିଲା। ଆନନ୍ଦପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡରେ ଧଳା ଜହର କାୟା ବିସ୍ତାର କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ମହିଳା ଜଣକ ଜେଲ ହାଜତ ଦଣ୍ଡରୁ ବାଦ ପଡିବା ଘଟଣା ଏବେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ ସାଜିଛି ।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ବ୍ରାଉନସୁଗାର ଜବତ ଘଟଣା: ୪ ଜଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜେଲ ହାଜତକୁ ଗଲେ ୩, ଜଣେ ଖଲାସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: మాపై దాడిచేసి మాపైనే కేసులా అంబటి ప్రశ్న
description: Ambati Rambabu : అమరావతి ప్రాంతంలో పర్యటించిన వైఎస్సార్ కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ (YCP) నాయకులపై జరిగిన దాడి వ్యవహారంపై మాజీ మంత్రి, వైసిపి సీనియర్ నేత అంబటి...
content:
Ambati Rambabu : అమరావతి ప్రాంతంలో పర్యటించిన వైఎస్సార్ కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ (YCP) నాయకులపై జరిగిన దాడి వ్యవహారంపై మాజీ మంత్రి, వైసిపి సీనియర్ నేత అంబటి రాంబాబు తీవ్రస్థాయిలో ధ్వజమెత్తారు. అమరావతిలో స్థానిక రైతులకు జరుగుతున్న అన్యాయాలను క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో పరిశీలించి, బాధితులకు అండగా నిలబడేందుకు వెళ్లిన తమపై అధికార పార్టీ శ్రేణులతో దాడులు చేయించడమే కాకుండా.. తిరిగి తమపైనే అక్రమ కేసులు బనాయించడం ఏంటని ఆయన నిలదీశారు. వైసిపి నేతలే అక్కడకు వెళ్లి రైతులను రెచ్చగొడుతున్నారంటూ ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారా చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు చేస్తున్న ఆరోపణలను అంబటి రాంబాబు తీవ్రంగా ఖండించారు. ఈ ఉదంతంలో పోలీసుల వైఖరి పూర్తిగా ఏకపక్షంగా మారిందని, శాంతిభద్రతలను కాపాడటంలో కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం ఘోరంగా విఫలమైందని మండిపడ్డారు.



Read Also : ఏపీ ఎయిర్‌పోర్టుల్లో మద్యం షాపులకు గ్రీన్ సిగ్నల్











డీజీపీ వైఖరిపై నిలదీత.. నిందితుల అరెస్టుపై అంబటి రాంబాబు డిమాండ్



ఈ దాడి ఘటనపై అంబటి రాంబాబు రాష్ట్ర డైరెక్టర్ జనరల్ ఆఫ్ పోలీస్ (DGP)ని నేరుగా ప్రశ్నిస్తూ తీవ్ర విమర్శలు చేశారు. ఘటనా స్థలంలో విధుల్లో ఉన్న ఒక పోలీస్ కానిస్టేబుల్‌పైనే దుండగులు దాడి చేసి తీవ్రంగా గాయపరిచినా, ఇంతవరకు ఒక్కరిని కూడా ఎందుకు అరెస్ట్ చేయలేదని ఆయన నిలదీశారు. శాంతిభద్రతలను కాపాడాల్సిన పోలీసు బాస్ అసలు ఏం చేస్తున్నారంటూ నిప్పులు చెరిగారు. పోలీసులపైనే దాడికి తెగబడిన సదరు నిందితుడు యథేచ్ఛగా తిరుగుతూ.. మంత్రి నారా లోకేశ్ పక్కన కూర్చుని కనిపిస్తున్నాడని, ఈ దృశ్యాలే రాష్ట్రంలో ఉన్న ప్రస్తుత పోలీసు వ్యవస్థ దుస్థితికి నిదర్శనమని అంబటి ఆరోపించారు. తక్షణమే దాడికి పాల్పడిన వారిపై కఠిన చర్యలు తీసుకోవాలని, తమపై పెట్టిన అక్రమ కేసులను ఉపసంహరించుకోవాలని ఆయన డిమాండ్ చేశారు.

title: రేవంత్ కు దమ్ముంటే అసెంబ్లీని రద్దు చేయాలి..హరీశ్ రావు డిమాండ్
description: CM Revanth : తెలంగాణ రాజకీయాల్లో సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి, బీఆర్ఎస్ వర్కింగ్ ప్రెసిడెంట్ కేటీఆర్, సీనియర్ నేత హరీశ్ రావు మధ్య మాటల యుద్ధం ముదిరి...
content:
CM Revanth : తెలంగాణ రాజకీయాల్లో సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి, బీఆర్ఎస్ వర్కింగ్ ప్రెసిడెంట్ కేటీఆర్, సీనియర్ నేత హరీశ్ రావు మధ్య మాటల యుద్ధం ముదిరి పాకాన పడింది. ముఖ్యమంత్రి రేవంత్ రెడ్డికి నిజంగా దమ్ముంటే, నైతికత ఉంటే తక్షణమే అసెంబ్లీని రద్దు చేసి ప్రజా తీర్పు కోరాలని మాజీ మంత్రి టి. హరీశ్ రావు శనివారం ఘాటు సవాల్ విసిరారు. సీఎం స్థానంలో ఉన్నాననే అహంకారంతో రేవంత్ రెడ్డి ప్రతిపక్షాలపై విచక్షణారహితంగా మాట్లాడుతున్నారని ఆయన తీవ్రస్థాయిలో మండిపడ్డారు. రేవంత్ రెడ్డి తనను తాను ‘గుంపు మేస్త్రి’గా అభివర్ణించుకుంటారని, కానీ ఆయన గుంపు మేస్త్రి కాదు.. తెలంగాణను ముంచేస్తున్న ‘ముంపు మేస్త్రి’ అంటూ హరీశ్ రావు ఎద్దేవా చేశారు. సీఎం రేవంత్ పగలు, రాత్రి అనే తేడా లేకుండా నిద్రలో కూడా కేసీఆర్‌ను కలవరిస్తున్నారని, ఆయనకు కేసీఆర్ ఫోబియా పట్టుకుందని ధ్వజమెత్తారు.



Read Also : చౌటకూర్‌లో ఘనంగా ప్రధాని 135వ మన్ కీ బాత్ కార్యక్రమం వీక్షణ



 







ప్రజా సమస్యలపై చర్చకు వైఖరి.. వ్యక్తిగత విమర్శలపై హరీశ్ రావు ధ్వజం



రాష్ట్రంలో గత కొన్ని నెలలుగా రైతులు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న ప్రధాన సమస్యల నుంచి ప్రజల దృష్టిని మళ్లించేందుకే ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఇటువంటి బూతు పురాణాలు అందుకుంటున్నారని హరీశ్ రావు ఆరోపించారు. ప్రభుత్వం అధికారంలోకి వచ్చి ఇన్నాళ్లయినా ‘రైతు బంధు’ (ప్రస్తుత రైతు భరోసా) నిధులు రైతులకు సకాలంలో అందడం లేదని, దీనిపై చర్చించేందుకు తక్షణమే అసెంబ్లీ ప్రత్యేక సమావేశాలు ఏర్పాటు చేయాలని ఆయన డిమాండ్ చేశారు. ఎన్నికల సమయంలో ఇచ్చిన ఆరు గ్యారంటీలు, రుణమాఫీ, రైతు బంధు నిధులపై తాము నిలదీస్తుంటే.. వాటికి సమాధానం చెప్పలేక రేవంత్ రెడ్డి వ్యక్తిగత దూషణలకు దిగుతున్నారని ఆగ్రహం వ్యక్తం చేశారు. కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రభుత్వం ఏం సాధించిందని ప్రజల్లోకి వెళ్తుందని ప్రశ్నించిన హరీశ్.. ప్రజా క్షేత్రంలోనే తేల్చుకునేందుకు తాము సిద్ధంగా ఉన్నామని స్పష్టం చేశారు.

title: End It frontman breaks silence on controversy of battle with man dressed as banana
description:
The Baltimore hardcore band faced backlash after a fan claimed he was attacked and stripped of his banana costume at one of their shows
The post End It frontman breaks silence on controversy of battle with man dressed as banana appeared first on NME.
content:
End It frontman Akil Godsey has spoken out for the first time since the viral “banana man” incident at one of the band’s recent shows.
The Baltimore hardcore band were playing at Lithuanian House in Toronto on June 5 when Godsey singled out a fan in the crowd who was wearing a banana costume.
In footage shared from the night, Godsey called the fan to the front and accused him of seeking attention. He then offered the band’s setlist to anyone who would “strip the banana”, after which members of the crowd removed the costume.
The fan later called out the band on Instagram, writing that he had been “an unwilling participant” and that his clothing had been removed “at the direction of a band I paid to see”.
“People have been trying to dim my sparkle my entire life,” he added. “It sucks, but I’m used to it.”
Now, Godsey has addressed the backlash in a video posted to Instagram, with a caption that read: “Thanks for the racism and death threats and dissertations. It’s all been very taxing. I’m gonna go raise my child now. Peace.”

In the video, Godsey pushed back against those who said they were “disappointed” in him, saying they had misunderstood the kind of band End It are.
“You’ve obviously not been listening to the band, and I don’t know what the fuck you thought was going on over here,” he said (via Stereogum). “We’re a hardcore band. We do hardcore things.”
He also suggested that the band could end as a result of the fallout, adding: “Everyone in my life loves me very much. I’m very well taken care of. I do not need your attention or validation. I’ll be just fine. Hey, if the band gotta quit, so be it. I guess I’ll go to work. I’m a fully functioning adult male. I’ll be just fine.”
“There’s more to life than whatever the fuck you think is going on over here,” he continued. “You don’t even know what’s going on over here. We haven’t spoken in ages. You’re living off of assumptions. Don’t assume. My parents taught me that. But have fun with the life you’ve made for yourself.”
The original incident divided the hardcore community, with some criticising the band for encouraging the crowd to remove the fan’s costume, while others argued that the fan should have expected a hostile reaction by wearing a novelty outfit to a hardcore show.
The backlash also appears to have affected End It’s touring plans, with the band no longer appearing on posters for Hatebreed’s European tour with Life Of Agony, having been included on earlier versions of the bill.
End It formed in Baltimore in 2017, and their debut album ‘Wrong Side Of Heaven’ was released last August via Flatspot Records.
The post End It frontman breaks silence on controversy of battle with man dressed as banana appeared first on NME.

title: দক্ষিণৰ চিনেমাত নায়িকাৰ ৰূপত কোন এই অসমীয়া অভিনেত্ৰী...
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, হাজো : দক্ষিণ ভাৰতীয় চিনেমা জগতত অসমৰ জীয়ৰী ভৈৰৱী ডেকাৰ দপদপনি ! হাজোৰ পাকোৰকনাৰ জীয়ৰী ভৈৰৱী ডেকাই দক্ষিণ ভাৰতীয় তেলেগু ছবিত অভিনয় কৰি দেখুৱাই দিছে নিজৰ প্ৰতিভা।

কাত্তা মালুকো নামৰ এখন তেলেগু ছবিত নায়িকাৰ ভূমিকাত অভিনয় কৰি হাজাৰ হাজাৰ দৰ্শকৰ প্ৰশংসা বুটলিবলৈ সক্ষম হৈছে ভৈৰৱী ডেকা। দৰিদ্ৰতা যে প্ৰতিভা বিকাশৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত হেঙাৰ হ'ব নোৱাৰে তাৰ প্ৰমাণ দাঙি ধৰিছে ভৈৰৱীয়ে।
উল্লেখযোগ্য যে, পিতৃ চন্দন ডেকা আৰু মাতৃ মিনু প্ৰভা ডেকাৰ ডাঙৰ ছোৱালী ভৈৰৱী ডেকা সৰুৰেই পৰা আছিল সাংস্কৃতিক দিশত আগবঢ়া। পিতৃ-মাতৃৰ আৰ্থিক অসুবিধাৰ বাবে ভৈৰৱী ডেকাক দিব পৰা নাছিল উপযুক্ত সুবিধা। অভিনয়ৰ লগতে পঢ়াতো অতি মেধাসম্পন্ন ভৈৰৱীয়ে মেট্ৰিক আৰু উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিকত ডিষ্ট্ৰিংচন লাভেৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হৈছিল।

সৰুৰে পৰা মেধাৱী ভৈৰৱীয়ে ২০২০ চনত এয়াৰ হোষ্টেজ হোৱাৰ লক্ষ্যৰে দক্ষিণ ভাৰতৰ ব্যস্ত চহৰ হাইদৰাবাদ অভিমুখে ৰাওনা হৈছিল। তাতেই এগৰাকী জনপ্ৰিয় মডেলৰে সাক্ষাত লাভ কৰে ভৈৰৱী ডেকা। প্ৰথমে মডেলিং জগত তাৰ পিছত দক্ষিণ ভাৰতীয় ছবিত নায়িকাৰ চৰিত্ৰত অভিনয়, এনেদৰে তেওঁ নিজ প্ৰতিভাৰে গৈ আছে আগুৱাই।

১২ জুনত দক্ষিণ ভাৰতৰ চাৰিখন ৰাজ্যত ভৈৰৱীয়ে অভিনয় কৰা চিনেমাখন আজিলৈকে দৰ্শকে উপভোগ কৰিয়ে আছে। ইফালে আৰু দুখন তেলুগু ছবি মুক্তিৰ পথত বুলি সদৰী কৰিছে ভৈৰৱী ডেকাৰ পিতৃ-মাতৃয়ে।

title: অসমত নহয়, জুহু বিচ্ছতহে গৈ জুবিন গাৰ্গে লিখিছিল এই গীত...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্ক : জুবিন গাৰ্গ তেতিয়া জুবিন গাৰ্গ হৈ উঠিছে। অনামিকা, মায়া, আশা আদি এলবাম ছুপাৰ- ডুপাৰ হিট। অসমৰ চৌদিশে চৰ্চিত হৈছিল এটাই নাম- জুবিন গাৰ্গ। সেয়া আছিল ৯০ দশকৰ শেষৰছোৱা সময়।
এইকেইটা এলবামৰ কাম শেষ কৰি নতুনকৈ হাত দিছিল 'জুবিনৰ গান' নামৰ এলবামটোত। তেতিয়া জুবিন গাৰ্গে অসমত থকাৰ উপৰিও মুম্বাইত সঘনাই থাকিবলৈ লৈছিল। গানৰ ৰেকৰ্ডিং, মিক্সিং আদি কামবোৰ মুম্বাইতে থাকি নিজে তদাৰক কৰি গানবোৰ সজাইছিল।
এবাৰ 'জুবিনৰ গান' নামৰ এলবামটিৰ কাম মুম্বাইলৈ গৈছিল প্ৰাণৰ শিল্পীগৰাকী। তেতিয়া জুবিন গাৰ্গে অসমৰ কেইবাগৰাকী বন্ধুৰ সৈতে ইউনিটি কম্পাউণ্ড, জুহু নামৰ বিশেষ অঞ্চলটিত থাকে। নিৰ্মীয়মাণ এলবামটিৰ বাকীকেইটা গান কৰি থকাৰ মাজতে এলবামটিৰে আন এটি গীত লিখা আৰু সুৰ কৰাৰ বাবে জুবিনে বিচাৰি ফুৰিছিল গীতৰ কথা আৰু সুৰ।
হাতত তুলি লৈছিল গীটাৰ। কিন্তু তথাপিও অহা নাছিল কথা আৰু সুৰ। জুবিনম অস্থিৰ, জুবিনক লাগে সুৰ, কথা লিখিবলৈ পোৱা নাই শব্দ। ইতিমধ্যে গীতৰ ধাৰণাটো জুবিনৰ মূৰতে ঘূৰি- পকি আছে। কি কৰো, কি নকৰো হৈ স্বভাৱসুলভভাৱে হৈছিল জুহু বিচ্ছলৈ। হাতত তুলি লৈছিল গীটাৰ।
সেইবাৰ জুবিন কিছু সময় মৌন হৈ চাই ৰৈছিল- বিচাৰিছিল গীতৰ সুৰ আৰু কথা। গীটাৰত এৰি দিছিল জুবিনৰ তৰ্জনী, মধ্যমা, অনামিকা আঙুলি। মুখত বিৰিঙি উঠিছিল প্ৰাপ্তিৰ হাঁহি। গীটাৰত তুলিছিল 'জুবিনৰ গান' এলবামটিৰ বাবে বিচাৰি থকা গানৰ সুৰ। একেলগে লিখি গৈছিল গীতটোৰ কথা। এনেকৈয়ে জুহু বিচ্ছত সৃষ্টি হৈছিল 'জুবিনৰ গান' নামৰ এলবামটিৰ সেই কালজয়ী গীত- লাহে লাহে অচিনাকি হ'লো আমি/ খোজে খোজে মৰমৰ আজি পাহৰণি...
উল্লেখযোগ্য যে, আজি জুবিনৰ অবৰ্তমানত তেওঁৰ স্মৃতি সুঁৱৰি বন্ধু ডনী হাজৰিকাই গীতটো ৰচনাৰ আঁৰৰ কাহিনী সদৰী কৰিছে সামাজিক মাধ্যমযোগে।

title: Ram Temple Donation Case: June 5 Raid Predates FIR, New CCTV Footage Emerges
description: All eight accused in the matter were remanded in judicial custody till June 29 by a court in Ayodhya. Police are expected to seek their custodial remand when they are produced before the court on Monday.
content: Police action in the alleged embezzlement of donations at the Ram Mandir in Ayodhya began days before it officially surfaced. The investigators have recovered cash during a raid on the residence of one of the accused, Avinash Shukla, on June 5. Notably, the case came to light only on June 7, and the raids indicate that initial inputs had already triggered a quiet probe on the ground. A new CCTV footage has also emerged as a key piece of evidence in the probe. In the CCTV footage, accessed by Times Now, Avinash Shukla is being taken away by the police. Earlier today, police teams, accompanied by local magistrates, carried out searches at the homes of the accused, including Lav Kush Mishra, Avinash Shukla and Ramashankar Yadav.      https://youtu.be/zr5vx0D9ef8?si=O0YtpANWd0K3JQtK They collected documents, including Aadhaar cards, PAN cards and bank-related details from the residence of accused Manish Yadav after asking his family members to open the locked house, news agency PTI quoted sources as saying.Searches were also carried out at the residences of other accused, including Ramashankar alias Tinnu Yadav. Yadav's family members were questioned and documents were examined.8 In Custody, Police Expected To Seek Remand on Monday Eight people - Avinash Shukla, Anukalp Mishra, Lav Kush Mishra, Manish Kumar Yadav, Karunesh Pandey, Ram Shankar Mishra, Subhash Srivastava and Ramashankar alias Tinnu Yadav - were arrested in connection with the matter and were remanded to judicial custody till June 29 on Friday. All were said to be associated with counting cash and valuables received as donations at the temple.The Ayodhya Police is expected to seek their custodial remand when they are produced before the court on Monday. The investigators have reportedly so far recovered Rs 79.85 lakh.Ram Mandir Donation Case: A Look At the Timeline The FIR, lodged at the instance of trust member Krishna Mohan, was registered following the recommendations of the preliminary report of a three-member Special Investigation Team (SIT) constituted by the Uttar Pradesh government.The three-member SIT, headed by Lucknow Divisional Commissioner Vijay Vishwas Pant, was constituted on June 13 at the Trust's request after the allegations of misappropriation surfaced on June 7. The SIT submitted its preliminary report to the state government on June 23.Ram Mandir Donations Row: What SIT Report RevealedIn its report, the SIT reportedly described Tinnu Yadav and Subhash Srivastava as key players in the conspiracy and its execution.In its 20-page report, the SIT reportedly mentioned about 70 theft-related incidents after analysing the CCTV footage. It mentions that the alleged embezzlement of the donation funds had been going on for 2-3 years.During the interrogation, two accused, including Tinnu Yadav and Subhash Srivastava, have reportedly made several important revelations related to the entire theft network. The SIT has written in the report that Tinnu had the keys to the bills without permission.Champat Rai Resigns, Ram Temple Trust Says 'Shocked, Hurt' The Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra (Trust) on Saturday said that it was "shocked, hurt, and deeply saddened by the incidents reported over the past few days", as it assured the devotees that items, like silver bricks and ornaments, are "safe and fully accounted for."In its first official confirmation amid the ongoing controversy, the Ram Temple Trust also said that it has received the resignations of Champat Rai and Anil Mishra, adding that a final decision will be taken in the next meeting.

title: বটদ্ৰৱা থানত অনুষ্ঠিত "গীত, নৃত্য আৰু খোলবাদ্য বিষয়ক আলোচনাচক্ৰ-২০২৬"ৰ সফল সামৰণি
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, বটদ্ৰৱা : মহাপুৰুষ শ্ৰীমন্ত শংকৰদেৱৰ জন্মস্থান বটদ্ৰৱা থানৰ ৰমাকান্ত মুক্তিয়াৰ আতা ভৱনত অনুষ্ঠিত "গীত, নৃত্য আৰু খোলবাদ্য বিষয়ক আলোচনাচক্ৰ-২০২৬"ৰ দেওবাৰে সামৰণি পৰে। মহাপুৰুষ শ্ৰীমন্ত শংকৰদেৱ গুৰুজনাৰ পবিত্ৰ জন্মস্থান, দ্বিতীয় বৈকুণ্ঠ বটদ্ৰৱা ধামত চিৰপ্ৰবাহিত হৈ থকা সাংস্কৃতিক সম্ভাৰ "গীত, নৃত্য আৰু বাদ্য"ৰ প্ৰচাৰ প্ৰসাৰ আৰু হেৰাই যাব খোজা সাংস্কৃতিক উপাদানসমূহৰ সংৰক্ষণ লগতে নৱপ্ৰজন্মৰ মাজলৈ বোৱাই নিয়াৰ মহান প্ৰয়াসেৰে শ্ৰীশ্ৰীবটদ্ৰৱা থান পৰিচালনা সমিতিয়ে অনুষ্ঠিত কৰিছে এই "গীত, নৃত্য আৰু খোলবাদ্য বিষয়ক আলোচনাচক্ৰ-২০২৬"।

তিনিদিনীয়া কাৰ্য্যসূচীৰে আৰম্ভ কৰা "গীত, নৃত্য আৰু খোলবাদ্য বিষয়ক আলোচনাচক্ৰ-২০২৬"ৰ আজি তৃতীয় তথা সামৰণী দিন। লক্ষীকান্ত আতা মঞ্চত আজি অনুষ্ঠিত কার্যক্রমণিকা অনুসৰি পুৱা বন্তি প্রজ্বলন কৰি বটদ্ৰৱা থানৰ ভকত পুটুল আতৈয়ে অনুষ্ঠানৰ আৰম্ভণি কৰে। তাৰ পাছতে বটদ্ৰৱাৰ বিশিষ্ট সত্ৰীয়া শিল্পী ৰঞ্জিত মহন্তৰ পৰিচালনাত মনোৰঞ্জন গোস্বামীকে আদি কৰি শিল্পীসকলে "চলৰে চল বন্ধু উদ্ধৱ হে..." শীৰ্ষক কৌ ৰাগৰ বৰগীত পৰিৱেশন কৰে।
ইয়াৰ লগে লগে বটদ্ৰৱা শ্ৰীমন্ত শংকৰদেৱ মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষা ড০ নমিতা কলিতাই সঞ্চালকৰ আসন অলংকৃত কৰা আলোচনাচক্ৰত "খোলৰ বহুমুখী ব্যৱহাৰ, প্ৰাচীন বাদ্যলংকাৰ আৰু বোলৰ বিস্তৃতিৰে ভাৰতীয় সংগীতৰ এক অন্যতম শাস্ত্রীয় বাদ্য" শীৰ্ষক বিষয়ৰ সন্দৰ্ভত আলোচনা কৰা হয়। প্ৰথমে সমল ব্যক্তি ৰূপে অংশ গ্ৰহণ কৰি জামুগুৰি চেউনী বৰদোৱা শলগুৰি সত্ৰৰ কুশ মহন্তই "অসমীয়াই শত কৌটি জন্মৰ বলত মহাপুৰুষ গুৰুজনাক পাইছে। মহাপুৰুষ শ্ৰীমন্ত শংকৰদেৱৰ অনবদ্য অৱদান বাদ্যযন্ত্ৰ হৈছে খোল। খোল দেৱবাদ্য, একক আৰু অনান্য। কৃষ্ণ সংস্কৃতিত বিলীন হোৱা সনাতনী বাদ্য খোল। বৰদোৱা আমাৰ স্বাভিমান, আমাৰ আবেগ, শিৰৰ মুকুট" বুলি প্ৰকাশ কৰে।

পাছত বিশিষ্ট শিল্পী ৰঞ্জিত মহন্তই "বটদ্ৰৱা থান, ঐতিহ্যমণ্ডিত সাংস্কৃতিক সমলৰ ভাণ্ডাৰ। কৈ শেষ কৰিব নোৱাৰা সমল সমূহ অতি সুন্দৰ সুললিত, শ্ৰুতিমধুৰ। বটদ্ৰৱাত ছয়কুৰি তথা ১২০ খন ভংগী নাচ আছে" বুলি প্ৰকাশ কৰি খোলবাদ্যৰ তাল, ধেমালি আদি পৰিবেশন কৰি সাৱলীল আৰু মৰ্মস্পৰ্শী পৰিবেশন কৰি উপস্থিত দৰ্শক সকলক মন্ত্ৰমুগ্ধ কৰি তোলে। পাছত শুকদল সৰুবড়ী শলগুৰি সত্ৰৰ বিতোপন মহন্তই "ধেমালিৰ ওপৰত সুকীয়া গৱেষণা হোৱা প্ৰয়োজন" বুলি মত প্ৰকাশ কৰে।
লগতে ধেমালি পৰিবেশ কৰাৰ লগতে নাচৰ বিষয়েও বৰ্ননা কৰে। আহাৰ বিৰতিৰ পিছত শিৱসাগৰ খাটপাৰ সত্ৰৰ জ্যোতিস্মান মহন্তই "বটদ্ৰৱা থানত প্ৰচলিত গীত মাতৰ লগত কেনেদৰে শিৱসাগৰ খাটপাৰ সত্ৰটো একেদৰে একেই লয়, বোল, তাল মানৰ বৃস্তিত বৰ্ননা কৰি পৰিবেশন কৰে।" শেষ সমল ব্যক্তি বটদ্ৰৱা শলগুৰি সত্ৰৰ উপেন বায়নেও খোলা বাজনা পৰিবেশন কৰে।

সঞ্চালকৰ ভাষণত ড০ নমিতা কলিতাই "বিদ্যালয়, মহাবিদ্যালয়তো সত্ৰীয়া গীত, নৃত্য আৰু খোলবাদ্য বিষয়ক পাঠ্যক্ৰমত অন্তৰ্ভুক্ত কৰা হওঁক" বুলি ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰি বটদ্ৰৱা থান পৰিচালনা সমিতিৰ মহান প্ৰয়াসক শ্ৰদ্ধাৰে কৃতজ্ঞতা জ্ঞাপন কৰে। শেষত বটদ্ৰৱা থান পৰিচালনা সমিতিৰ সাংস্কৃতিক উপসমিতিৰ তত্বাৱধায়ক ৰঞ্জিত মহন্ত আৰু বটদ্ৰৱা থান পৰিচালনা সমিতিৰ সাধাৰণ সম্পাদক লাচিত বৰদলৈয়ে "তিনিদিনৰ আলোচনা চক্ৰত উপস্থিত থকা সমল ব্যক্তি, অতিথি, গৱেষক, ছাত্ৰ ছাত্ৰী সকলোৰে সহযোগিতা, সহায় আৰু  উপস্থিতিৰ বাবে কৃতজ্ঞতা আৰু ধন্যবাদ জ্ঞাপন কৰে।
বটদ্ৰৱা থান পৰিচালনা সমিতিৰ সভাপতি অম্লান জ্যোতি দেৱ গোস্বামী, উপদেষ্টা ব্ৰজেন কাকতি, ইন্দ্ৰমোহন বৰুৱা, ধিং মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ ড০ বিমান হাজৰিকা, শিল্পী কৃষ্ণ গোস্বামীকে আদি কৰি শতাধিক লোক উপস্থিত থকা অনুষ্ঠানটিৰ শেষত কল্যাণ খৰমান জুৰি সামৰণি মৰা হয়। ইফালে বিগত দুটা দিনত শ্ৰীমন্ত শংকৰদেৱৰ কলাক্ষেত্ৰৰ সচিব সুদৰ্শন ঠাকুৰ, কন্ঠশিল্পী তৰালী শৰ্মা, নৃত্যাচাৰ্য যতীন গোস্বামী, ড০ মল্লিকা কন্দলিকে আদি কৰি কেইবাগৰাকী ব্যক্তিয়ে অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰে।

title: Skydiving Plane Crashes in France, Killing All 11 People Aboard
description: Five instructors, five students and a pilot died when the plane crashed on Sunday morning in a field near the northeastern city of Nancy.
content: Those aboard the plane that crashed had been scheduled to take part in tandem skydiving lessons, the mayor of Nancy told local news media.

title: Priyanka Chopra wows in Rs 1.8 lakh Silvia Tcherassi halter dress
গহপুৰত আটছাৰ কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীৰ অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠানত বিধায়ক পল্লৱ লোচন দাস
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, গহপুৰ : অসম চাহ জনজাতি ছাত্ৰ সন্থাৰ বিশ্বনাথ জিলা সমিতিৰ উদ্যোগত দেওবাৰে গহপুৰ নগৰৰ কনকলতা ভৱনত অনুষ্ঠিত হোৱা কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীৰ এক অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠানত ২৫০ গৰাকী ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীক আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে অভিনন্দন জ্ঞাপন কৰা হয়। আটছাৰ গহপুৰ, বিহালী, বিশ্বনাথ আৰু নদুৱাৰ শাখা সমিতিৰ সহযোগত অনুষ্ঠিত হোৱা এই অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠানত সদ্য ঘোষিত উচ্চ মাধ্যমিক আৰু উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিক চূড়ান্ত বৰ্ষৰ পৰীক্ষাৰ ফলাফলত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা জিলাখনৰ ২৫০ গৰাকী চাহ জনগোষ্ঠীয় কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীক অভিনন্দন জ্ঞাপন কৰি তেওঁলোকক আগন্তুক শৈক্ষিক যাত্ৰাৰ বাবে অনুপ্ৰেৰণা জনোৱা হয়।

সেই উপলক্ষে আজি দিনৰ প্ৰায় ১-৩০ বজাৰ পৰা অনুষ্ঠিত হোৱা অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠানৰ মুকলি সভাখনত সভাপতিত্ব কৰে আটছাৰ বিশ্বনাথ জিলা সমিতিৰ সভাপতি মহেশ ছত্ৰীয়ে। জিলা সমিতিৰ সাধাৰণ সম্পাদক নিলোৎপল ৰৱিদাসে আদৰণি ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰা সভাখনত মুখ্য অতিথি হিচাপে অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰি বিশ্বনাথ বিধানসভা সমষ্টিৰ বিধায়ক পল্লৱ লোচন দাসে কয় যে মানুহ সমাজ প্ৰিয় জীৱ।এখন সুস্থ সমাজ গঠনত মানুহৰ অৱদান অতুলনীয়।
এখন সমাজক সঠিক দিশেৰে আগুৱাই লৈ যোৱাৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত প্ৰতিগৰাকী লোকৰ মন, চিন্তা শুদ্ধ আৰু পবিত্ৰ হ'ব লাগিব।ভাষণ প্ৰসংগত তেওঁ আৰু কয় যে সুস্থ সমাজ আৰু পৰিৱেশে মানুহৰ উপযুক্ত মানসিকতা নিৰ্মাণ কৰে।সু মানসিকতা গঢ়ি তুলিবলৈ প্ৰতিগৰাকী লোক সংস্কাৰী হ'ব লাগিব বুলি উল্লেখ কৰি তেওঁ ভাষণত কয় যে সংস্কাৰী শিক্ষাই মানৱ জীৱনত ইতিবাচক প্ৰভাৱ পেলায়।

ভাষণ প্ৰসংগত তেওঁ সৰুৰে পৰাই সংস্কাৰী শিক্ষাৰে শিক্ষিত হৈ শৈক্ষিক ক্ষেত্ৰত আগুৱাই যাবলৈ উঠি অহা প্ৰজন্মৰ প্ৰতি আহ্বান জনায়। উক্ত অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠানৰ মুকলি সভাত কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰী সকলক স্মাৰক,ফাইল কভাৰ, অভিধান, কেৰিয়াৰ সম্পৰ্কীয় কিতাপেৰে অভিনন্দন জ্ঞাপন কৰা হয়। 
উক্ত সভাত বিশিষ্ট অতিথি হিচাপে অংশ গ্ৰহণ কৰি বিশিষ্ট সমাজকৰ্মী তথা শংকৰদেৱ শিক্ষা নিকেতন, গহপুৰৰ সভাপতি উদয় আদিত্য গোস্বামীয়ে ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰি সুস্থ সমাজ গঠনত ছাত্ৰ ছাত্ৰীৰ ভূমিকাৰ ওপৰত বহল বাখ্য আগবঢ়ায়। ইপিনে সদৌ অসম সাংবাদিক সন্থাৰ কেন্দ্ৰীয় সহকাৰী সম্পাদক ভুৱন শইকীয়াই ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰি আটছাৰ এই পদক্ষেপক শলাগ লৈ কয় যে এনেধৰণৰ অনুষ্ঠানে ছাত্ৰ ছাত্ৰী সকলক অনুপ্ৰেৰণা যোগায়।

উক্ত সভাত ছয়দুৱাৰ মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ ডঃ কিশোৰ সিং ৰাজপুত,যুৱ সমাজকৰ্মী প্ৰণৱজ্যোতি ভূঞা, আটছাৰ কেন্দ্ৰীয় সভাপতি জগদীশ বৰাইক, সাধাৰণ সম্পাদক সুনীল তিৰ্কী, ছাত্ৰ নেতা ধ্ৰুৱজ্যোতি বৰা, দিব্যজ্যোতি ভূঞা,কমলজিৎ দত্ত,লেনিন ব্ৰহ্ম, পংকজ মহানন্দ, শিক্ষক জিতেন মহানন্দ প্ৰমুখ্যে বহু বিশিষ্ট লোক উপস্থিত থাকে। সভাখনৰ আৰম্ভণিতে পুৱা আটছাৰ পতাকা উত্তোলন কৰে বিশ্বনাথ জিলা সমিতিৰ সভাপতি মহেশ ছত্ৰীয়ে।
ছহিদ শ্ৰদ্ধাঞ্জলি অনুষ্ঠানৰ শুভাৰম্ভ কৰে সাধাৰণ সম্পাদক নিলোৎপল ৰৱিদাসে। উল্লেখযোগ্য যে উক্ত সভাত -চাহ জনগোষ্ঠীয় কৃষ্টি সংস্কৃতিৰ বিভিন্ন সাংস্কৃতিক অনুষ্ঠান পৰিৱেশন কৰি উপস্থিত ৰাইজক আপ্লুত কৰা হয়।

title: Why the Fiat 500 is the ultimate retro revival
description:
Fiat captured the 1957 car's spirit in 2007 with great effect - and it's worked for 20 years

What goes into a successful retro revival of an old car?
For a good example, let's look at the Renault 5. The consensus is that it gets all the key features right. Much like the original 5, it's great to drive and even better to look at, but at its core it captures that classless spirit that the car always had. Just as with that car (and even more so in the modern era of PCP finance and leasing), almost anyone can walk into a Renault dealership and drive away with a sharp, stylish runaround that would look just as at home in Knightsbridge as it would in Kettering.
Other rebirths haven't been so well resolved, losing touch of the elements that defined the original, whether that be through a hike in pricing (the Land Rover Defender, I would argue) or a complete departure in terms of positioning, shape, styling and character (it starts with 'F' and ends with 'ord Capri').
So there are hits and there are misses, but when all is said and done, the king of the comeback has to be the Fiat 500.
Astonishingly, you have to go all the way back to 2004 to find the genesis of this modern classic, in the form of the Trepiùno concept, conceived in response to the overwhelming success of the Smart Fortwo city car in Fiat's home market. It was instantly recognisable as a descendant of the Nuova 500 that had mobilised Italy after World War II.
The footprint was still tiny in comparison to its contemporaries, at comfortably less than 4m long, but there was enough space inside for a 3+1 seating layout - hence the name, which translates literally as 'three plus one'.
It was a hit. Such a hit, in fact, that the production version was immediately green-lit and revealed just two years later with minimal fettling - apart from the sensible addition of a full-sized fourth seat.
From the off, it was clear that Fiat had stayed faithful to the 500's original purpose. This new car was just as much of an everyman's car as the original: priced well and easy to use. It used the Panda's platform as its base while power came from the well-aged but eternally excellent Fire engine, economical, revvy and robust as it is.
The reborn 500 excelled in everyday use, thanks to the great visibility out of its expansive windscreen and generous cabin space that belied its diminutive dimensions, and there was a lot to love for driving enthusiasts too: well-weighted steering and a low kerb weight made it a joy to chuck about, along with the later addition of a peppy, charismatic two-cylinder engine.
A gorgeous interior, with kitchen appliance- esque HVAC dials and a delightfully simple combined speedo and tacho, helped make it an inherently cheerful car, putting a smile on your face whenever you drove it.
But the looks were what really sold it to the masses. It was as desirable as a Gucci bag or a pair of Diesel jeans (both brands that collaborated with Fiat to create special-edition 500s). Ferrari UK even ordered a fleet daubed in its signature Rosso Corsa paint to use as courtesy cars for customers.
My mum was among the admirers, buying three in a row over the years - including one in which I learned to drive and eventually had the joy of using every day.
It was an everyman's car, yes, but it was a truly enviable one. Fiat captured lightning in a bottle in a way that very few others have ever done.

title: Who is Akanksha Chamola? Inside her 10-year love story with Gaurav Khanna, LOCK UPP: Sach Ya Sazaa divorce confession, Mumbai sea-facing luxury apartment, cars collection and complete life journey
description: Akanksha Chamola and Gaurav Khanna’s 10-year love story takes a dramatic turn after her Lock Up revelation about separation and divorce, shedding light on their Mumbai home, lifestyle, cars, net worth and personal journey.
content: The entertainment world often moves fast, but every once in a while a story comes along that makes people pause, scroll back, and read again. The name Akanksha Chamola has been circulating widely across social media feeds and news conversations, especially after her recent appearance on a reality-based show where she spoke candidly about her personal life. What began as curiosity about a television actress soon turned into a much larger conversation about love, marriage, compatibility, and the pressures of living life in the public eye. Akanksha is not just known as Gaurav Khanna’s wife. She has built her own identity in Indian television over the years, steadily working in serials and digital projects while maintaining a relatively private public image. However, recent revelations about her marriage have brought her back into the spotlight in a very different way, making audiences revisit her journey from television sets to real-life headlines. At the same time, interest has also grown around Gaurav Khanna’s life, from his Mumbai home to his cars, net worth, and career milestones. Together, their story has become one of the most talked-about subjects in entertainment circles. Who is Akanksha Chamola and how did she enter Indian television? Akanksha Chamola is an Indian television actor who has been active in the industry for over a decade. She entered the world of television with steady determination rather than overnight fame, gradually finding her space in fiction dramas and supporting roles before moving into more visible parts. Her early recognition came through television projects where she shared screen space with popular names in the industry, which helped her build a foundation as a dependable performer.Over time, she continued to explore different formats, including episodic television and digital storytelling, which expanded her creative range and visibility among audiences. What are the key shows and projects she has worked in? Akanksha Chamola’s work spans both television and web-based projects, reflecting the shift many actors make between mediums today. Her notable appearances include: Swaragini, where she appeared alongside actors like Helly Shah and Tejasswi PrakashBhootu, a family-oriented television series aired in 2017Can You See Me, which released in 2022Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye, one of her more recent television appearancesWeb projects such as Rewind Wala Love and Mafia KingThese roles may not always have been headline-grabbing, but they built her presence steadily in the industry and helped her remain a recognisable face on Indian television. Where is she from and what is her educational background? Although Akanksha Chamola has spent much of her life in Mumbai, she originally comes from a Garhwali background with roots in Uttarakhand. This detail came into public conversation more recently, adding an interesting cultural layer to her identity that many fans were previously unaware of. She has completed her postgraduation in Commerce, a qualification that sits in contrast to her creative profession in acting. It also reflects a familiar story in the entertainment industry, where many performers come from academic backgrounds far removed from cinema and television. Did you know, Akanksha’s journey into acting was not driven by industry connections but by gradual interest in performance and storytelling, something she explored after completing her education? How did Akanksha Chamola and Gaurav Khanna meet and get married? The love story between Akanksha Chamola and Gaurav Khanna is often described as one that began in a professional setting before turning personal. The two reportedly met during early career interactions in the industry, where auditions and work circles brought them into contact. Their bond developed gradually, and what started as friendship eventually turned into a relationship. After dating for a period of time, they decided to get married in November 2016. Reports suggest the wedding took place in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, keeping the ceremony intimate and rooted in family traditions. One detail that often surprises people is their age gap. Gaurav Khanna, born in 1981, and Akanksha, born in 1991, share a 10-year difference, something they have never publicly portrayed as an obstacle in their relationship. Why are Akanksha Chamola and Gaurav Khanna in the news for separation? Recent attention around the couple stems from Akanksha Chamola’s candid statements on a reality show appearance, where she spoke openly about the state of her marriage. She revealed that she and Gaurav Khanna had been living separately for around a year and had been considering separation privately before making anything public. According to her, the decision was mutual and not driven by conflict or negativity. Instead, it was rooted in differences in long-term compatibility and life expectations. She emphasised that there was no bitterness between them and that they continue to maintain respectful communication. This revelation came as a shock to many fans, especially since the couple had often appeared supportive of each other in public events and social media interactions. What did Akanksha Chamola say about the separation? Akanksha’s statements reflected a tone of clarity rather than drama. She explained that both individuals had attempted to make the relationship work, but eventually realised that their futures were moving in different directions. She also mentioned that despite separation, their families were aware of the situation and had been part of the understanding process over time. What stood out in her comments was the absence of blame, which is rare in public celebrity breakups. Did you know, she revealed that even during major professional milestones in Gaurav’s career, including his reality television appearances, their personal equation had already been undergoing quiet changes behind the scenes? What does Gaurav Khanna’s Mumbai home look like? Gaurav Khanna lives in a modern apartment in Mumbai with Akanksha Chamola. The home reflects a calm and understated design philosophy rather than flashy luxury. It is reported to have open spaces, soft neutral tones, and large windows that allow natural light to dominate the interiors. The living area carries a refined look with cream-coloured walls, elegant lighting, and coordinated furniture that gives the space a warm yet polished feel. One of the highlights of the home is its view, which reportedly opens to parts of Mumbai’s skyline and sea-facing stretches, making it a peaceful retreat from the city’s fast pace.        View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Akanksha Chamola (@akankshagkhanna) The couple has also designed a dedicated study space that contrasts the rest of the home with deeper colour tones and artistic detailing, making it a functional yet expressive corner. What do we know about Gaurav Khanna’s cars, lifestyle and net worth? Gaurav Khanna’s lifestyle reflects a mix of practicality and comfort rather than excessive display. He is known to have an interest in cars and bikes, with a collection that includes both luxury and utility-focused vehicles. Audi A6, a premium sedan often associated with executive comfortJeep Wrangler Rubicon, known for its rugged design and off-road capabilityA mid-range SUV gifted to his wife, chosen for daily useA Citroën car won during a reality television taskMotorcycles including a Royal Enfield Classic 350 and a Harley Davidson Street 750His professional journey has been equally consistent. From television serials like Anupamaa to appearances in CID and reality shows, he has built a strong presence in the industry. He also gained wider recognition after winning Celebrity MasterChef and later Bigg Boss 19, where he reportedly secured a trophy along with a cash prize. As per industry estimates reported by media outlets such as News18, his net worth is believed to be in the range of Rs 15 crore to Rs 18 crore, earned through television projects, endorsements, and reality show winnings. At the heart of this story, beyond fame and headlines, is a reminder that public lives often hide private complexities. Akanksha Chamola and Gaurav Khanna’s journey, from a love story that began on professional sets to a relationship now evolving into a new chapter, continues to draw attention not just because of who they are, but because of how relatable their emotional transitions feel in a world where relationships are constantly under the spotlight.

title: From living in 120 sqft chawl room with 12 people in Mumbai to owning Rs 20 crore sky mansion in Goregaon: Meet Ravi Kishan and daughter Rivva Kishan, seen in The Alliance, net worth and success story
description: From a 120 sq ft chawl room shared with 12 people to a Rs 20 crore, 8,000 sq ft Goregaon sky mansion, Ravi Kishan’s journey with daughter Rivva Kishan reflects struggle, success, net worth growth, and rising stardom.
content: Success stories often sound unbelievable until you hear them from the people who lived through every struggle. Ravi Kishan's journey is one of those rare tales. Long before he became one of the biggest names in Bhojpuri cinema, a Bollywood actor, television personality and Member of Parliament, he was a young dreamer trying to survive in Mumbai with almost nothing. Today, the actor lives in a lavish 8,000 sq ft home in Goregaon with his family, while his daughter Rivva Kishan is steadily building her own identity in the entertainment industry. Their story is not just about fame or luxury. It is about persistence, family support and years of hard work that transformed a cramped chawl room into one of Mumbai's most talked-about celebrity homes. How did Ravi Kishan go from a chawl room to a luxury duplex? Ravi Kishan has never hidden the difficult days that shaped his career. Born in Jaunpur, Uttar Pradesh, he arrived in Mumbai with big dreams but very little money. In an interview with Dainik Bhaskar, he recalled living in a tiny 120 sq ft room in a chawl with 12 other aspiring actors.           "I have worked hard to reach here. I remember my early days in Mumbai when I used to live in a 120 square feet room in a chawl. I used to share that room with 12 of my friends and today I alone own a 12 bedroom house," he said. That remarkable transformation has become one of the defining stories of his life and career. What makes Ravi Kishan's Mumbai home so special? Ravi Kishan now lives with his family on the 14th floor of a residential building in Goregaon, Mumbai. His residence is believed to be worth around Rs 20 crore. Instead of purchasing a single apartment, the actor combined two duplex homes to create an expansive residence spread across nearly 8,000 sq ft. The home features 12 bedrooms, a double-height terrace, a private gym, spacious living areas and dedicated work spaces. The interiors follow a soothing palette of white and neutral shades, giving the house an elegant yet understated look rather than an overly extravagant feel. Did you know? Celebrity homes in Mumbai rarely offer such large living spaces because of the city's premium real estate prices. An 8,000 sq ft apartment is considered exceptionally spacious. Why does the terrace feel more like a garden than a penthouse? One of the most striking parts of Ravi Kishan's home is its lush terrace. Rather than filling it with luxury décor, the family has created a thriving green space packed with trees and plants. Ravi credits his wife, Preeti, for bringing the garden to life. According to him, the terrace grows sapota, chillies and several other plants, making it possible to enjoy organic produce despite living high above Mumbai's busy streets. He has often said he never imagined they would one day grow fruits and vegetables on the 14th floor of a concrete building.           The terrace has become a peaceful retreat where the family spends time away from the demands of film shoots and political commitments. What keeps Ravi Kishan happiest when he is at home? Despite a packed schedule, Ravi enjoys the quieter moments of home life. He has often shared that he prefers wearing comfortable clothes, working out in his personal gym and spending time with his plants whenever he gets a break. His love for animals is equally well known. The household includes two pet dogs, a Rottweiler and a Chihuahua, along with three lovebirds and a parrot named Coco. Ravi has also spoken about enjoying long conversations with his plants, a habit that reflects his fondness for nature. Who is Rivva Kishan? Rivva Kishan, also known as Riva Kishan, is the daughter of Ravi Kishan and Preeti Shukla. While she comes from one of the biggest families in Bhojpuri cinema, she has focused on building an independent career. Before making her acting debut, she trained under veteran actor Naseeruddin Shah's acting playgroup and later studied at The Acting Corps Institute in the United States. She entered Bollywood with Sab Kushal Mangal in 2020 alongside Priyaank Sharma and Akshaye Khanna.                  View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Rivva Kishan (@itsrivakishan) More recently, Rivva has also gained attention for her appearance in Amazon Prime's The Alliance, further expanding her presence as a young actor and digital personality. What is Ravi Kishan's net worth? According to Ravi Kishan's Lok Sabha election affidavit, his declared net worth exceeds Rs 43.3 crore. His assets include: Movable assets worth around Rs 15.8 crore.Immovable properties valued at approximately Rs 27.5 crore.Earlier public disclosures had also placed the value of his Goregaon residence at nearly Rs 20 crore, making it one of his most significant assets.                    Which luxury cars does Ravi Kishan own? Ravi Kishan's garage reflects his successful career across films and politics. Reports suggest he owns several premium vehicles, including Mercedes-Benz and BMW models. A bespoke Rolls-Royce Phantom, estimated to be worth around Rs 11 crore, has also attracted considerable public attention. Earlier reports have additionally linked him to vehicles such as a Jaguar and Toyota Innova, showing a mix of practical and luxury choices. What is Ravi Kishan's family like? Away from the camera, Ravi Kishan is a devoted family man. He has been married to Preeti Shukla since 1993, and together they have four children, including Rivva. His younger daughter, Ishita Shukla, made headlines after joining the Indian Armed Forces under the Agnipath Scheme in 2023, adding another proud chapter to the family's story.Ravi Kishan's life is proof that remarkable success often begins with extraordinary struggle. From sleeping in a crowded chawl room with 12 people to owning a sprawling 12-bedroom residence in Mumbai, every milestone reflects decades of determination rather than overnight fame.                                                   Today, while Ravi continues balancing films and public life as the Member of Parliament from Gorakhpur, his daughter Rivva is gradually creating her own space in the entertainment industry. Together, they represent two generations connected by ambition, resilience and the belief that every dream, no matter how distant it seems, is worth chasing.
